src/components/SocialProofToast.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/components/Logo.tsx:import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:export default function Logo({ className = "", textClassName = "text-lg" }: { className?: string, textClassName?: string }) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:  const [imgError, setImgError] = useState(false);
src/components/Logo.tsx:  const [processedSrc, setProcessedSrc] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/Logo.tsx:    setImgError(false);
src/components/Logo.tsx:    
src/components/Logo.tsx:    const img = new Image();
src/components/Logo.tsx:    img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
src/components/Logo.tsx:    img.src = "/logo.png?v=4";
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:    img.onload = () => {
src/components/Logo.tsx:      try {
src/components/Logo.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/components/Logo.tsx:        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/Logo.tsx:        if (!ctx) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:          setProcessedSrc("/logo.png?v=4");
src/components/Logo.tsx:          return;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        }
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        const width = img.naturalWidth;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        const height = img.naturalHeight;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        canvas.height = height;
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        const imgData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, width, height);
src/components/Logo.tsx:        const data = imgData.data;
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        // Bounding box bounds of non-white content
src/components/Logo.tsx:        let minX = width;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        let minY = height;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        let maxX = 0;
src/components/Logo.tsx:        let maxY = 0;
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        // Convert white/near-white pixels to transparent & find content bounds
src/components/Logo.tsx:        for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:          for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:            const index = (y * width + x) * 4;
src/components/Logo.tsx:            const r = data[index];
src/components/Logo.tsx:            const g = data[index + 1];
src/components/Logo.tsx:            const b = data[index + 2];
src/components/Logo.tsx:            const a = data[index + 3];
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:            // A pixel is considered white/near-white background if it meets these conditions:
src/components/Logo.tsx:            const isWhite = r > 230 && g > 230 && b > 230;
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:            if (isWhite) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:              data[index + 3] = 0; // Set alpha to 0 (make transparent)
src/components/Logo.tsx:            } else if (a > 10) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:              // Valid solid content pixel
src/components/Logo.tsx:              if (x < minX) minX = x;
src/components/Logo.tsx:              if (x > maxX) maxX = x;
src/components/Logo.tsx:              if (y < minY) minY = y;
src/components/Logo.tsx:              if (y > maxY) maxY = y;
src/components/Logo.tsx:            }
src/components/Logo.tsx:          }
src/components/Logo.tsx:        }
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        ctx.putImageData(imgData, 0, 0);
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:        // Crop to content bounding box to auto-trim huge empty margins
src/components/Logo.tsx:        if (maxX >= minX && maxY >= minY) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const padding = 6; // Add a tiny safety margin around cropped text
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const cropX = Math.max(0, minX - padding);
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const cropY = Math.max(0, minY - padding);
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const cropW = Math.min(width - cropX, (maxX - minX) + 2 * padding);
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const cropH = Math.min(height - cropY, (maxY - minY) + 2 * padding);
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const cropCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/components/Logo.tsx:          cropCanvas.width = cropW;
src/components/Logo.tsx:          cropCanvas.height = cropH;
src/components/Logo.tsx:          const cropCtx = cropCanvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:          if (cropCtx) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:            cropCtx.drawImage(canvas, cropX, cropY, cropW, cropH, 0, 0, cropW, cropH);
src/components/Logo.tsx:            setProcessedSrc(cropCanvas.toDataURL('image/png'));
src/components/Logo.tsx:          } else {
src/components/Logo.tsx:            setProcessedSrc(canvas.toDataURL('image/png'));
src/components/Logo.tsx:          }
src/components/Logo.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Logo.tsx:          setProcessedSrc(canvas.toDataURL('image/png'));
src/components/Logo.tsx:        }
src/components/Logo.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/components/Logo.tsx:        console.error("Logo processing failed, using raw fallback:", err);
src/components/Logo.tsx:        setProcessedSrc("/logo.png?v=4");
src/components/Logo.tsx:      }
src/components/Logo.tsx:    };
src/components/Logo.tsx:
src/components/Logo.tsx:    img.onerror = () => {
src/components/Logo.tsx:      setImgError(true);
src/components/Logo.tsx:    };
src/components/Logo.tsx:  }, []);

src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const res = await fetch("/api/rates");
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch data from backend cache.");

src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  };
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  // Force manual refresh
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  const triggerManualRefresh = async () => {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    setIsRefreshing(true);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    try {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const idToken = await auth.currentUser?.getIdToken();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const res = await fetch("/api/rates/refresh", {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        method: "POST",
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        headers: {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:          "Content-Type": "application/json",
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:          "Authorization": `Bearer ${idToken}`
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        }

src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      if (data.success) {

src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:          message: "Cache was manually updated from the server.",
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:          type: "success"
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        });
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        setRatesData(data.rates);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        // Refresh values
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        await fetchData();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        await fetchHistory();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      } else {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        throw new Error(data.error || "Refresh error");
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      }
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      addNotification({
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        title: "Refresh Failed",
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        message: e.message || "An error occurred during manual refresh.",
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        type: "alert"
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      });
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      setIsRefreshing(false);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    }
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  };
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    fetchData();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    fetchHistory();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    // Poll stats every 30 seconds
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 30000);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(interval);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  // Update Countdown Timer to Next Scheduled Update
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    if (!cacheStats?.nextScheduledFetchTime) return;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    const updateCountdown = () => {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const now = Date.now();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const diff = cacheStats.nextScheduledFetchTime - now;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      if (diff <= 0) {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        setTimeToNext("Updating...");
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        fetchData();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:        return;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      }
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const seconds = Math.floor((diff % 60000) / 1000);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      setTimeToNext(`${minutes}m ${seconds}s`);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    };
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    updateCountdown();
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    const timer = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(timer);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  }, [cacheStats]);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  // Handle calculator conversion
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    if (!ratesData?.rates || !calcAmount) {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      setConvertedResult(null);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      return;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    }
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    const rates = ratesData.rates;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    const fromRate = calcFrom === "USD" ? 1 : rates[calcFrom];
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    const toRate = calcTo === "USD" ? 1 : rates[calcTo];
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    if (fromRate && toRate) {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      // 1. Convert AMOUNT to reference base (USD)
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const amountInUSD = calcAmount / fromRate;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      // 2. Convert reference (USD) to target TO
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      const finalResult = amountInUSD * toRate;
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      setConvertedResult(finalResult);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    } else {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      setConvertedResult(null);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    }
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  }, [calcAmount, calcFrom, calcTo, ratesData]);
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:  if (isLoading) {
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:    return (
src/components/ForexRatesExplorer.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[70vh] text-white">

src/components/TradesView.tsx:export default function TradesView() {
src/components/TradesView.tsx:  const { trades } = useApp();
src/components/TradesView.tsx:
src/components/TradesView.tsx:  const formatPrice = (price: any, symbol: string) => {
src/components/TradesView.tsx:    if (price === undefined || price === null) return "---";
src/components/TradesView.tsx:    const numPrice = Number(price);

src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:export default function PayoutsView() {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const { transactions, user, updateTradingAccount, setActiveView } = useApp();
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const payouts = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'payout');
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const now = Date.now();
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const fundedAccounts = user?.tradingAccounts?.filter(acc => acc.type === 'funded') || [];
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const getPayoutInfo = (acc: TradingAccount) => {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const currentBalance = acc.balance;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const initialBalance = acc.initialBalance || acc.balance;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const totalProfit = Math.max(0, currentBalance - initialBalance);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    // 45% Consistency Rule implementation
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const history = acc.history || [];
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const dailyProfits: { [date: string]: number } = {};
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    history.forEach((trade: any) => {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      const date = new Date(trade.timestamp).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      dailyProfits[date] = (dailyProfits[date] || 0) + (trade.pnl || 0);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    });
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const maxDailyProfit = Math.max(0, ...Object.values(dailyProfits));
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const consistencyLimit = totalProfit * 0.45;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const isConsistent = true; // Consistency rule only applies to evaluation/challenge stages, not funded accounts
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const now = Date.now();
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const milestones = acc.payoutMilestones || [];
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const maturedAmount = milestones
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      .filter(m => m.unlockAt <= now)
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      .reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.amount, 0);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const lockedAmount = milestones
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      .filter(m => m.unlockAt > now)
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      .reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.amount, 0);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const isEligible = user?.isVerified && user?.linkedPaymentMethod?.isVerified && isConsistent;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const available = isEligible ? Math.min(totalProfit, maturedAmount) : 0;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    return { totalProfit, maturedAmount, lockedAmount, available, isConsistent, maxDailyProfit, consistencyLimit };
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  };
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const totalAvailable = fundedAccounts.reduce((sum, acc) => sum + getPayoutInfo(acc).available, 0);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:  const handleRequestPayout = async (acc: TradingAccount) => {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    // MANDATORY VERIFICATION CHECK
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    if (!user?.isVerified) {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      alert("Verification is mandatory to process payouts. Please complete your profile verification in the Profile tab.");
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      setActiveView('profile');
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      return;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    }
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    if (!user?.linkedPaymentMethod) {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      alert("A saved payment method is required to request payouts. Please make a purchase to link your card or contact support.");

src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    if (info.available <= 0) return;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:

src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const refundAmount = (!acc.feeRefunded && acc.initialFee) ? acc.initialFee : 0;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    const finalAmount = shareAmount + refundAmount;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:

src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      return;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    }
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    try {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      // 1. Update the trading account balance and milestones
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      const now = Date.now();
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      const updatedMilestones = (acc.payoutMilestones || []).map(m => {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        if (m.unlockAt <= now) {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:          // Effectively "consuming" the matured milestones
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:          return { ...m, amount: 0 }; 
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        }
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        return m;
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      }).filter(m => m.amount > 0);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      await updateTradingAccount(acc.id, {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        balance: acc.balance - amountToWithdraw,
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        equity: acc.equity - amountToWithdraw,
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        payoutMilestones: updatedMilestones,
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:        feeRefunded: true // Mark as refunded after first payout
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      });
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      // 2. Add to payout history (mocked if no server route yet, but we'll use addNotification for feedback)
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      // In a real app, you'd call an API to create a payment request (Stripe/Crypto/etc)
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      alert(`Request sent! $${amountToWithdraw} has been withdrawn from the account. You will receive $${finalAmount.toFixed(2)} (including any applicable fee refund) after admin approval.`);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      console.error("Payout error:", e);
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:      alert("Error processing payout.");
src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:    }

src/components/PayoutsView.tsx:

src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:import { motion, useMotionValue, useSpring, useTransform } from 'motion/react';
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:interface ThreeDCardProps {
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  children: React.ReactNode;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  className?: string;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  glowColor?: string;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:export default function ThreeDCard({ children, className = "", glowColor = "rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.2)" }: ThreeDCardProps) {
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const x = useMotionValue(0);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const y = useMotionValue(0);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const mouseXSpring = useSpring(x);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const mouseYSpring = useSpring(y);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const rotateX = useTransform(mouseYSpring, [-0.5, 0.5], ["10deg", "-10deg"]);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const rotateY = useTransform(mouseXSpring, [-0.5, 0.5], ["-10deg", "10deg"]);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const handleMouseMove = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    // Disable on touch/small screens
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    if (window.innerWidth < 1024) return;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const width = rect.width;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const height = rect.height;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const xPct = (mouseX / width) - 0.5;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    const yPct = (mouseY / height) - 0.5;
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    x.set(xPct);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    y.set(yPct);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  };
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  const handleMouseLeave = () => {
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    x.set(0);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    y.set(0);
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  };
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  return (
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    <motion.div
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      onMouseLeave={handleMouseLeave}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      style={{
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        rotateX,
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        rotateY,
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        transformStyle: "preserve-3d",
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      }}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      className={`relative rounded-3xl transition-all duration-200 group ${className}`}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    >
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      <div 
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        style={{
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:          transform: "translateZ(75px)",
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:          transformStyle: "preserve-3d",
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        }}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        className="relative z-10"
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      >
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        {children}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      </div>
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      {/* Glow Effect */}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      <div 
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        className="absolute inset-0 z-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity blur-3xl pointer-events-none"
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:        style={{ background: glowColor }}
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:      />
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:    </motion.div>
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:  );
src/components/ThreeDCard.tsx:}

src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                 {(() => {

src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const history = selectedAccount.history || [];
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const currentProfit = Math.max(0, (selectedAccount.balance || 0) - (selectedAccount.initialBalance || 0));
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const initBal = selectedAccount.initialBalance || 100000;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // Targets & Penalty logic
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const baseTarget = selectedAccount.rules?.profitTarget || (initBal * 0.10);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const penalty = selectedAccount.rules?.targetPenalty || 0;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const actualTarget = baseTarget + penalty;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const hasReachedTarget = currentProfit >= actualTarget;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // 1. Daily drawdown (5% max daily loss rule)
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const dailyDrawdownLimitAmt = selectedAccount.rules?.dailyDrawdown || (initBal * 0.05);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const todayStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const todayClosedTrades = history.filter((t: any) => {
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     return new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString() === todayStr;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   });
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const todayClosedPnL = todayClosedTrades.reduce((sum: number, t: any) => sum + parseFloat(t.pnl || 0), 0);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const startOfDayBal = (selectedAccount.balance || initBal) - todayClosedPnL;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const currentEq = selectedAccount.equity || selectedAccount.balance || initBal;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const todayLoss = Math.max(0, startOfDayBal - currentEq);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const dailyLossPercentage = Math.min((todayLoss / dailyDrawdownLimitAmt) * 100, 100);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // 2. Max Total Drawdown (10%)
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const maxDrawdownLimitAmt = selectedAccount.rules?.maxDrawdown || (initBal * 0.10);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const totalLoss = Math.max(0, initBal - currentEq);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const totalLossPercentage = Math.min((totalLoss / maxDrawdownLimitAmt) * 100, 100);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // 3. 45% Profit Consistency Outlier Check (Exceeding limit validation)
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const dailyProfitsMap: { [date: string]: number } = {};
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   history.forEach((t: any) => {
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     const d = new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     dailyProfitsMap[d] = (dailyProfitsMap[d] || 0) + parseFloat(t.pnl || 0);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   });
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const maxDailyProfit = Object.values(dailyProfitsMap).length > 0 ? Math.max(0, ...Object.values(dailyProfitsMap)) : 0;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const baseForLimit = selectedAccount.type?.startsWith('evaluation') ? baseTarget : currentProfit;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const limit = (baseForLimit || 1) * 0.45;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const isConsistencyViolated = currentProfit > 0 && maxDailyProfit > limit;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const consistencyPercentage = limit > 0 ? Math.min((maxDailyProfit / limit) * 100, 100) : 0;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // 4. Minimum 3 trading days rule
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const tradingDaysSet = new Set(history.map(t => {
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     return new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   }));
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const uniqueDaysCount = tradingDaysSet.size;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const tradingDaysPassed = uniqueDaysCount >= 3;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // 5. Inactivity check (3-days inactive interval)
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const lastTradeTime = history.length > 0 
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     ? Math.max(...history.map((t: any) => t.close_time || t.timestamp || 0)) 
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     : selectedAccount.createdAt || Date.now();
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const hoursInactive = (Date.now() - lastTradeTime) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const daysInactive = Math.floor(hoursInactive / 24);
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const isInactiveAlert = daysInactive >= 3;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   // 6. Scalping warnings
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const scalpWarnings = selectedAccount.scalpWarningsCount || 0;
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   const isFullyEligibleToUpgrade = hasReachedTarget && !isConsistencyViolated && tradingDaysPassed && scalpWarnings < 3 && !selectedAccount.status?.includes('failed');
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                   return (
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                     <div className="space-y-6">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                       {/* Top Targets & Drawdown Indicators */}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                       <div className="space-y-4">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                         {/* 1. Profit Target Progress */}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                         <div className="space-y-1">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           <div className="flex justify-between text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-300">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <span>PROFIT TARGET</span>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <span className={hasReachedTarget ? "text-green-400" : "text-cyan-400"}>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               ${Math.round(currentProfit).toLocaleString()} / ${Math.round(actualTarget).toLocaleString()}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             </span>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           </div>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           <div className="h-2 w-full bg-slate-950 rounded-full overflow-hidden p-[1px]">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <motion.div 
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               initial={{ width: 0 }}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               animate={{ width: `${Math.min((currentProfit / actualTarget) * 100, 100)}%` }}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               className={`h-full ${hasReachedTarget ? 'bg-green-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(34,197,94,0.5)]' : 'bg-cyan-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)]'} rounded-full`}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             />
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           </div>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider text-right font-bold">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             {hasReachedTarget ? "🏆 TARGET RECONCILED - CONSISTENCY AUDIT ONGOING" : `${Math.round(Math.max(0, actualTarget - currentProfit)).toLocaleString()} USD Left`}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           </p>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                         </div>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                         {/* 2. Real-time Daily Drawdown */}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                         <div className="space-y-1 p-3 bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <span className="text-slate-400">DAILY LIMIT (5% MAX LOSS)</span>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <span className={todayLoss >= dailyDrawdownLimitAmt ? "text-toxic-orange" : "text-slate-100"}>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               ${Math.round(todayLoss).toLocaleString()} / ${Math.round(dailyDrawdownLimitAmt).toLocaleString()}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             </span>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           </div>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           <div className="h-1.5 w-full bg-slate-950 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <motion.div 
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               initial={{ width: 0 }}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               animate={{ width: `${dailyLossPercentage}%` }}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                               className={`h-full ${todayLoss >= dailyDrawdownLimitAmt ? 'bg-red-500' : 'bg-toxic-orange'}`}
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             />
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           </div>
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                           <div className="flex justify-between text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-slate-500">
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:                             <span>SOD BAL: ${Math.round(startOfDayBal).toLocaleString()}</span>

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getDistanceToPoint = (x1: number, y1: number, x2: number, y2: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return Math.sqrt((x2 - x1) ** 2 + (y2 - y1) ** 2);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getDistanceToSegment = (px: number, py: number, x1: number, y1: number, x2: number, y2: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const l2 = (x2 - x1) ** 2 + (y2 - y1) ** 2;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (l2 === 0) return getDistanceToPoint(px, py, x1, y1);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let t = ((px - x1) * (x2 - x1) + (py - y1) * (y2 - y1)) / l2;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return getDistanceToPoint(px, py, x1 + t * (x2 - x1), y1 + t * (y2 - y1));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const y2 = draw.end ? series.priceToCoordinate(draw.end.price) : null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (draw.type === "trendline" && x1 !== null && y1 !== null && x2 !== null && y2 !== null) {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (draw.type === "hline" && y1 !== null) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        distance = Math.abs(my - y1);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (draw.type === "rect" && x1 !== null && y1 !== null && x2 !== null && y2 !== null) {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        distance = Math.min(d1, d2, d3, d4);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (draw.type === "triangle" && x1 !== null && y1 !== null && x2 !== null && y2 !== null) {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            distance = Math.min(distance, segDist);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (distance < minDistance) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        minDistance = distance;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        closestId = draw.id;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (config?.contractSize) return config.contractSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("BTC") || sym.includes("ETH")) return 1;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("XAU") || sym.includes("GOLD")) return 100;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("XAG") || sym.includes("SILVER")) return 5000;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("US30") || sym.includes("NAS100") || sym.includes("US500")) return 1;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return 100000;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getDecimalsForSymbol = (sym: string) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("JPY")) return 3;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("BTC") || sym.includes("ETH") || sym.includes("SOL") || sym.includes("XAU") || sym.includes("GOLD")) return 2;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return 5;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getPipValuePerLot = (sym: string, currentP: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Standard forex contract size is 100,000 units. For crypto/commodities it varies.
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let contractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(sym);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const pipSize = getPipSize(sym);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let pipValue = contractSize * pipSize; // Value in QUOTE currency
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const parts = sym.split("/");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const base = parts[0];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const quote = parts[1];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // To calculate risk we need pip value in USD (Account Currency)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (quote && quote !== "USD") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (prices[`USD/${quote}`]) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        pipValue = pipValue / prices[`USD/${quote}`];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (prices[`${quote}/USD`]) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        pipValue = pipValue * prices[`${quote}/USD`];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (base === "USD") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        pipValue = pipValue / (currentP || 1);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (quote === "JPY") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        pipValue = pipValue / (prices["USD/JPY"] || 150);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return pipValue;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  // Auto-calculate lots based on risk and SL
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (!isRiskMode || !sl || !price) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const slPrice = parseFloat(sl);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (isNaN(slPrice)) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const pips = Math.abs(price - slPrice) / getPipSize(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (pips <= 0) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const riskAmount = (balance * riskPercent) / 100;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const pipValPerLot = getPipValuePerLot(symbol, price);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let calculatedLots = riskAmount / (pips * pipValPerLot);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Leverage safety cap (don't allow auto-risk to calculate more than 100:1 leverage)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let contractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const currentEquityFallback = balance + positions.reduce((acc, pos) => acc + getPositionPnL(pos), 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const usedMargin = positions.reduce((acc, p) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let cs = getContractSizeForSymbol(p.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      return acc + (p.open_price * p.lots * cs) / globalSettings.leverageCap;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }, 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const freeMargin = currentEquityFallback - usedMargin;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const maxLeverage = globalSettings.leverageCap;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let basePInUSD = 1;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const gBaseCurrency = symbol.split("/")[0];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (gBaseCurrency !== "USD") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       basePInUSD = prices[`${gBaseCurrency}/USD`] || (prices[`USD/${gBaseCurrency}`] ? 1 / prices[`USD/${gBaseCurrency}`] : price);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const maxLotsByLeverage = Math.max(0, (freeMargin * maxLeverage) / (basePInUSD * contractSize));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    calculatedLots = Math.min(calculatedLots, maxLotsByLeverage);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Standardize to 2 decimals, min 0.01
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    setLots(Math.max(0.01, Math.round(calculatedLots * 100) / 100));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  }, [isRiskMode, riskPercent, sl, symbol, price, balance]);

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getPipSize = (sym: string) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const config = symbolConfigs.find((c) => c.symbol === sym);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (config) {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if ((sym.includes("BTC") || sym.includes("ETH")) && config.pipSize !== 1.0) return 1.0;

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("JPY")) return 0.01;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (sym.includes("BTC") || sym.includes("ETH")) return 1.0;

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return 0.0001;

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    setSl(

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  // Calculate PnL locally in UI with professional precision
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getPositionPnL = (pos: any) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const currentPrice = prices[pos.symbol];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (!currentPrice) return 0; // Don't calculate if no market price yet
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const isBuy = pos.type === "buy";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const diff = isBuy
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      ? currentPrice - pos.open_price
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      : pos.open_price - currentPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const contractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(pos.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let pnl = diff * pos.lots * contractSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Currency conversion to USD
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const quote = pos.symbol.split("/")[1];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (quote === "JPY") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // USD/JPY cross: PnL is in JPY, divide by current USD/JPY price
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const usdjpy = prices["USD/JPY"] || currentPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      pnl = pnl / usdjpy;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return pnl;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const getPositionPips = (pos: any) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const currentPrice = prices[pos.symbol] || pos.open_price;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const isBuy = pos.type === "buy";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const diff = isBuy
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      ? currentPrice - pos.open_price
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      : pos.open_price - currentPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return diff / getPipSize(pos.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const calculateProjectedPnL = (p: any, targetPrice: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const entry = parseFloat(p.open_price);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const diff = p.type === 'buy' ? targetPrice - entry : entry - targetPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const pipSize = getPipSize(p.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const pips = diff / pipSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Simple PnL calculation for labels
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const contractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(p.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let pnl = diff * p.lots * contractSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const quote = p.symbol.split("/")[1];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (quote === "JPY") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       const usdjpy = prices["USD/JPY"] || prices[p.symbol];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       if (usdjpy) pnl = pnl / usdjpy;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return { pnl, pips };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const currentEquity =
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    balance + positions.reduce((acc, pos) => acc + getPositionPnL(pos), 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const consistencyInfo = (() => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (activeAccount?.type !== 'evaluation') return null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const dailyProfits: { [date: string]: number } = {};
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    history.forEach((t: any) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const d = new Date(t.timestamp || t.close_time).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      dailyProfits[d] = (dailyProfits[d] || 0) + (t.pnl || 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const maxDailyProfit = Math.max(0, ...Object.values(dailyProfits));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const profitTarget = activeAccount.rules?.profitTarget || 1;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const limit = profitTarget * 0.45;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const isViolated = maxDailyProfit > limit;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return { maxDailyProfit, limit, isViolated };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  })();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const globalUsedMargin = positions.reduce((acc, p) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let cs = getContractSizeForSymbol(p.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return acc + (p.open_price * p.lots * cs) / globalSettings.leverageCap;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  }, 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const globalFreeMargin = currentEquity - globalUsedMargin;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const currentContractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const currentMarketPrice = prices[symbol] || price;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  let basePInUSD = 1;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const gBaseCurrency = symbol.split("/")[0];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  if (gBaseCurrency !== "USD") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     basePInUSD = prices[`${gBaseCurrency}/USD`] || (prices[`USD/${gBaseCurrency}`] ? 1 / prices[`USD/${gBaseCurrency}`] : currentMarketPrice);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const maxAllowedLots = currentMarketPrice ? Math.max(0, (globalFreeMargin * globalSettings.leverageCap) / (basePInUSD * currentContractSize)) : 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const calculateVolume = (data: any[]) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return data.map(v => ({
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      time: v.time,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      value: v.volume || 0,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      color: v.close >= v.open ? "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.4)" : "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4)",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const calculateVWAP = (data: any[]) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let cumulativeTPV = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let cumulativeVolume = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let currentSession = "";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // We want to reset VWAP at 17:00 New York time, which is the start of the Forex daily session.
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const formatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      timeZone: "America/New_York",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      year: "numeric",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      month: "numeric",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      day: "numeric",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      hour: "numeric",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      hour12: false
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return data.map(v => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const date = new Date(v.time * 1000);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const parts = formatter.formatToParts(date);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let year = "", month = "", day = "", hour = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      for (const p of parts) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (p.type === "year") year = p.value;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (p.type === "month") month = p.value;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (p.type === "day") day = p.value;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (p.type === "hour") hour = parseInt(p.value, 10);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // If hour is >= 17, it belongs to the *next* trading session (day).
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // For VWAP grouping, we can just use the day string, but we shift the day if hour >= 17.
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // A simple string identifier for the session:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let sessionDay = parseInt(day, 10);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let sessionMonth = parseInt(month, 10);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let sessionYear = parseInt(year, 10);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (hour >= 17) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        // Simple approximation: just add 1 to the day. For end-of-month, this might result in "32", 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        // but it's totally fine since it's just a unique string identifier for the session!
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        sessionDay += 1;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const sessionIdStr = `${sessionYear}-${sessionMonth}-${sessionDay}`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (sessionIdStr !== currentSession) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          currentSession = sessionIdStr;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          cumulativeTPV = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          cumulativeVolume = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const typicalPrice = (v.high + v.low + v.close) / 3;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // Use tick volume from TwelveData if available, otherwise just use 1 (TWAP equivalent)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // because wild proxies cause the VWAP to tear away from price maliciously.
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const volume = v.volume > 0 ? v.volume : 1; 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      cumulativeTPV += typicalPrice * volume;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      cumulativeVolume += volume;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      return {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        time: v.time,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        value: cumulativeTPV / cumulativeVolume,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  // Countdown Timer Update Logic
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let animationFrameId: number;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const updateTimer = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const timerEl = countdownTimerRef.current;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!timerEl) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const tfMap: Record<string, number> = {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        S10: 10, S30: 30, M1: 60, M5: 300, M15: 900, M30: 1800, H1: 3600, H4: 14400, D1: 86400, W1: 604800,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const tfSeconds = tfMap[timeframe] || 60;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const nowSec = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const remainder = nowSec % tfSeconds;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const timeRemaining = tfSeconds - remainder;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let formatted = "";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (timeRemaining < 60) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        formatted = `00:${timeRemaining.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else if (timeRemaining < 3600) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const m = Math.floor(timeRemaining / 60);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const s = timeRemaining % 60;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        formatted = `${m.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${s.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const h = Math.floor(timeRemaining / 3600);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const m = Math.floor((timeRemaining % 3600) / 60);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const s = timeRemaining % 60;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        formatted = `${h.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${m.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${s.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      timerEl.innerText = formatted;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // Position logic
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (candlestickSeriesRef.current && pricesRef.current) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const currentPrice = pricesRef.current[symbol];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (currentPrice !== undefined && currentPrice !== null) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          try {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const y = candlestickSeriesRef.current.priceToCoordinate(currentPrice);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            if (y !== null) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              timerEl.style.top = `${Math.max(0, y + 15)}px`; // Position right below the price axis label
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              timerEl.style.display = 'block';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              timerEl.style.display = 'none';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          } catch(e) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            timerEl.style.display = 'none';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          timerEl.style.display = 'none';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  // Breach Check Simulator
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     if (!activeAccount || activeAccount.status !== 'active') return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     const getDeducedInitialBalance = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       let ib = activeAccount.initialBalance || 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       if (ib > 0) return ib;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       const currentBal = activeAccount.balance || 10000;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       if (activeAccount.rules?.maxDrawdown && activeAccount.rules.maxDrawdown > 100) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         return activeAccount.rules.maxDrawdown * 10;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       } else if (activeAccount.rules?.dailyDrawdown && activeAccount.rules.dailyDrawdown > 100) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         return activeAccount.rules.dailyDrawdown * 20;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         const standards = [5000, 10000, 25000, 50000, 100000, 200000];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         let bestAlloc = 10000;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         let minDiff = Infinity;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         standards.forEach(s => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           const diff = Math.abs(s - currentBal);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           if (diff < minDiff) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             minDiff = diff;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             bestAlloc = s;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         return bestAlloc;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     const initBalance = getDeducedInitialBalance();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     const currentEq = balance + positions.reduce((acc, pos) => acc + getPositionPnL(pos), 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     let shouldBreach = false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     let breachReason = '';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     const getRuleThresholdValue = (val: any, refBalance: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       const num = parseFloat(val);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       if (isNaN(num) || num <= 0) return 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       return num <= 100 ? (refBalance * num) / 100 : num;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     // Standard Evaluation/Competition Drawdown Rules
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     if (activeAccount.type) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (!shouldBreach && activeAccount.rules?.dailyDrawdown) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           const dailyDrawdownLimit = getRuleThresholdValue(activeAccount.rules.dailyDrawdown, initBalance);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           const maxDailyLoss = initBalance - dailyDrawdownLimit;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           if (currentEq <= maxDailyLoss) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              shouldBreach = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              breachReason = `Daily Drawdown Limit Reached ($${dailyDrawdownLimit.toLocaleString()})`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       if (activeAccount.rules?.maxDrawdown) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const maxDrawdownLimit = getRuleThresholdValue(activeAccount.rules.maxDrawdown, initBalance);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const maxEquityLoss = initBalance - maxDrawdownLimit;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (currentEq <= maxEquityLoss) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             shouldBreach = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             breachReason = `Max Total Drawdown Limit Reached ($${maxDrawdownLimit.toLocaleString()})`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:       }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     // Weekend Holding Rule for Funded Accounts (Excluding Crypto which has its own weekend override)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     if (activeAccount.type === 'funded' && isWeekend()) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const hasNonCryptoWeekend = positions.some(p => !TRADING_SYMBOLS["Crypto"].includes(p.symbol));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (hasNonCryptoWeekend) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           shouldBreach = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           breachReason = 'Weekend Holding Prohibited on Funded Accounts';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     // Crypto Overnight Rule in Weekend (Applies to all accounts including funded)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     const cryptoWeekendOvernight = positions.find(p => 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        TRADING_SYMBOLS["Crypto"].includes(p.symbol) && 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        isWeekend() && 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        isOvernight(p.open_time)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     if (cryptoWeekendOvernight) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        shouldBreach = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        breachReason = 'Crypto Overnight Holding Prohibited during Weekend';
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     if (shouldBreach) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        alert(`⚠️ Account Breached: ${breachReason}. All open positions will be closed.`);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const historyToPush = positions.map(p => ({
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            ...p,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            close_time: Date.now(),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            close_price: prices[p.symbol] || p.open_price,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            pnl: getPositionPnL(p),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            reason: 'Breach Closure'
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        setPositions([]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        setBalance(currentEq);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        setHistory(prev => [...historyToPush, ...prev]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        updateTradingAccount(activeAccount.id, {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          status: 'suspended', 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          balance: currentEq,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          openTrades: [],
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     // Profit Target Passing Rule for Evaluation/Phase Accounts
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     if (activeAccount.type && activeAccount.type.startsWith('evaluation')) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const profitTarget = activeAccount.rules?.profitTarget || 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const currentProfit = currentEq - initBalance;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (profitTarget > 0 && currentProfit >= profitTarget) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            // Determine consistency & trading days before evaluating pass
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const dailyProfitsCount: { [date: string]: number } = {};
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            history.forEach((t: any) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              const d = new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              dailyProfitsCount[d] = (dailyProfitsCount[d] || 0) + (t.pnl || 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const maxDailyProfitVal = Math.max(0, ...Object.values(dailyProfitsCount));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const consistencyLimitVal = profitTarget * 0.45;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const isConsistentVal = maxDailyProfitVal <= consistencyLimitVal;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const tradingDaysCountVal = new Set(history.map(t => new Date(t.timestamp || t.close_time || Date.now()).toLocaleDateString())).size;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            if (!isConsistentVal || tradingDaysCountVal < 3) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               // Do not pass yet: Outliers exceed 45% limit or less than 3 trading days
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           const targetPercentage = ((profitTarget / initBalance) * 100).toFixed(0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           alert(`🎉 Congratulations! You reached the profit target of $${profitTarget.toLocaleString()} (${targetPercentage}%) to pass the phase. Your account has been stopped and sent for review.`);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           const historyToPush = positions.map(p => ({
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               ...p,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               close_time: Date.now(),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               close_price: prices[p.symbol] || p.open_price,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               pnl: getPositionPnL(p),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               reason: 'Phase Passed'
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           }));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           setPositions([]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           setBalance(currentEq);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           setHistory(prev => [...historyToPush, ...prev]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           updateTradingAccount(activeAccount.id, {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             status: 'pending', 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             balance: currentEq,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             openTrades: [],
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           addNotification({
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             title: "Evaluation Phase Passed! 🎉",
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             message: `Congratulations! You reached the profit target of $${profitTarget.toLocaleString()} on account #${activeAccount.accountNumber}. The account was stopped and sent for review!`,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             type: 'success',
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:             link: '/profile'
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:     }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  }, [prices, activeAccount, balance, positions, addNotification]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  // SL / TP / Pending Simulator
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let toCloseIds: string[] = [];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let historyToPush: any[] = [];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let newBalanceAccum = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let addedPenaltyAccum = 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    positions.forEach((pos) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const currentPrice = prices[pos.symbol];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!currentPrice) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let closeIt = false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let closedPrice = currentPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let reason = "";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const parsedSl = (pos.sl && pos.sl_active !== false) ? parseFloat(pos.sl) : null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const parsedTp = (pos.tp && pos.tp_active !== false) ? parseFloat(pos.tp) : null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (pos.type === "buy") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (parsedSl && currentPrice <= parsedSl) { closeIt = true; closedPrice = parsedSl; reason = "SL"; }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        else if (parsedTp && currentPrice >= parsedTp) { closeIt = true; closedPrice = parsedTp; reason = "TP"; }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (parsedSl && currentPrice >= parsedSl) { closeIt = true; closedPrice = parsedSl; reason = "SL"; }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        else if (parsedTp && currentPrice <= parsedTp) { closeIt = true; closedPrice = parsedTp; reason = "TP"; }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (closeIt) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        toCloseIds.push(pos.id);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        // Calculate PnL exactly at the closing price
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const isBuy = pos.type === "buy";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const diff = isBuy
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          ? closedPrice - pos.open_price
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          : pos.open_price - closedPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const contractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(pos.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        let pnl = diff * pos.lots * contractSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const quote = pos.symbol.split("/")[1] || "USD";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (quote === "JPY") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          pnl = pnl / closedPrice;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        newBalanceAccum += pnl;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (pos.isNewsTrade && reason === "TP" && pnl > 0 && activeAccount?.rules?.newsTrading === false && activeAccount?.type !== 'funded') {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          addedPenaltyAccum += pnl;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        historyToPush.push({
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          ...pos,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          close_price: closedPrice,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          close_time: Date.now(),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          pnl,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          reason,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (toCloseIds.length > 0) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      setBalance((b: number) => b + newBalanceAccum);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      setPositions((prev: any[]) =>
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        prev.filter((p) => !toCloseIds.includes(p.id)),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      setHistory((prev: any[]) => [...historyToPush, ...prev]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (addedPenaltyAccum > 0 && activeAccount?.type !== 'funded') {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         updateTradingAccount(activeAccount.id, {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            rules: {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               ...activeAccount.rules,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               maxDrawdown: activeAccount.rules?.maxDrawdown || 5000,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               dailyDrawdown: activeAccount.rules?.dailyDrawdown || 2500,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               profitTarget: activeAccount.rules?.profitTarget || 5000,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:               targetPenalty: (activeAccount.rules?.targetPenalty || 0) + addedPenaltyAccum
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let toTrigger: any[] = [];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    pendingOrders.forEach((po) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const currentPrice = prices[po.symbol];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!currentPrice || currentPrice <= 0) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let trigger = false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let actualTriggerType = "buy";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (po.type === "buy limit" && currentPrice <= po.target_price) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        trigger = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        actualTriggerType = "buy";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (po.type === "buy stop" && currentPrice >= po.target_price) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        trigger = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        actualTriggerType = "buy";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (po.type === "sell limit" && currentPrice >= po.target_price) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        trigger = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        actualTriggerType = "sell";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (po.type === "sell stop" && currentPrice <= po.target_price) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        trigger = true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        actualTriggerType = "sell";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (trigger) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        toTrigger.push({ ...po, actualTriggerType });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (toTrigger.length > 0) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      executeOrders(toTrigger);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  }, [prices, timeframe, positions, pendingOrders]);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Initialize state vars for aggregating live candles
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    let currentLiveBar: any = null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const aggregateAndAddBar = (tickTime: number, priceValue: number, volumeValue: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const tfMap: Record<string, number> = {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        S10: 10, S30: 30, M1: 60, M5: 300, M15: 900, M30: 1800, H1: 3600, H4: 14400, D1: 86400, W1: 604800,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const tfSecs = tfMap[timeframe] || 60;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const barTime = Math.floor(tickTime / tfSecs) * tfSecs;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!currentLiveBar || currentLiveBar.time !== barTime) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        // commit previous if we have one and register it
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (currentLiveBar && historicalDataRef.current) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const idx = historicalDataRef.current.findIndex(b => b.time === currentLiveBar.time);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (idx !== -1) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            historicalDataRef.current[idx] = currentLiveBar;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            historicalDataRef.current.push(currentLiveBar);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        currentLiveBar = {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          time: barTime,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          open: priceValue,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          high: priceValue,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          low: priceValue,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          close: priceValue,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          volume: volumeValue
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        currentLiveBar.high = Math.max(currentLiveBar.high, priceValue);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        currentLiveBar.low = Math.min(currentLiveBar.low, priceValue);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        currentLiveBar.close = priceValue;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        currentLiveBar.volume += volumeValue;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (candlestickSeriesRef.current) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        candlestickSeriesRef.current.update(currentLiveBar as any);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        // Trigger indicators
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        calculateAndSetIndicators();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const calculateAndSetIndicators = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!historicalDataRef.current || historicalDataRef.current.length === 0) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const dataFull = [...historicalDataRef.current];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (currentLiveBar && !dataFull.some(b => b.time === currentLiveBar.time)) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        dataFull.push(currentLiveBar);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (vwapSeriesRef.current) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const vwapData = calculateVWAP(dataFull);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        vwapSeriesRef.current.setData(vwapData);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const volumeData = calculateVolume(dataFull);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        volumeSeriesRef.current.setData(volumeData);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
