src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (isCryptoSym) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // 1. Crypto Loading & Subscribing (Binance Feed)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let bInterval = "1m";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (timeframe === "S10" || timeframe === "S30") bInterval = "1s";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "M1") bInterval = "1m";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "M5") bInterval = "5m";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "M15") bInterval = "15m";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "M30") bInterval = "30m";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "H1") bInterval = "1h";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "H4") bInterval = "4h";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "D1") bInterval = "1d";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      else if (timeframe === "W1") bInterval = "1w";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const loadBinanceHistorical = async () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        try {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const limit = timeframe === "S10" || timeframe === "S30" ? "800" : "500";
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const histUrl = `https://api.binance.com/api/v3/klines?symbol=${binanceSym}&interval=${bInterval}&limit=${limit}`;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const res = await fetch(histUrl);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Binance status error " + res.status);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const raw = await res.json();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (isCancelled) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const candles = raw.map((item: any) => ({
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            time: Math.floor(Number(item[0]) / 1000),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            open: parseFloat(item[1]),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            high: parseFloat(item[2]),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            low: parseFloat(item[3]),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            close: parseFloat(item[4]),
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            volume: parseFloat(item[5])
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          // Group 1-second ticks into 10s or 30s bars
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          let formattedList = candles;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (timeframe === "S10" || timeframe === "S30") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const step = timeframe === "S10" ? 10 : 30;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const groupedList: any[] = [];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            let activeGroup: any = null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            candles.forEach((c: any) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              const groupTime = Math.floor(c.time / step) * step;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              if (!activeGroup || activeGroup.time !== groupTime) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                if (activeGroup) groupedList.push(activeGroup);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                activeGroup = {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                  time: groupTime,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                  open: c.open,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                  high: c.high,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                  low: c.low,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                  close: c.close,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                  volume: c.volume
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                activeGroup.high = Math.max(activeGroup.high, c.high);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                activeGroup.low = Math.min(activeGroup.low, c.low);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                activeGroup.close = c.close;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:                activeGroup.volume += c.volume;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            if (activeGroup) groupedList.push(activeGroup);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            formattedList = groupedList;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          historicalDataRef.current = formattedList;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (candlestickSeriesRef.current) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            candlestickSeriesRef.current.setData(formattedList as any);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            if (formattedList.length > 0) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              const last = formattedList[formattedList.length - 1];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              currentLiveBar = { ...last };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              setPrice(last.close);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              setPrices(prev => ({ ...prev, [symbol]: last.close }));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          calculateAndSetIndicators();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        } catch (err) {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          setWsStatus("error");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const connectBinanceSocket = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        try {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          bSocket = ws;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:              } else {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // 2. Forex Loading & Polling (Dukascopy Feed)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const isForexClosedNow = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const d = new Date(Date.now() + serverTimeOffset);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const day = d.getUTCDay(); // 0 = Sun, 5 = Fri, 6 = Sat
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const hour = d.getUTCHours();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (day === 5 && hour >= 21) return true; 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (day === 6) return true; 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (day === 0 && hour < 21) return true; 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const isMarketCurrentlyClosed = isForexClosedNow();

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const loadDukascopyHistorical = async () => {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          const res = await fetch(`/api/forex/candles?symbol=${encodeURIComponent(symbol)}&interval=${timeframe}&count=350`);

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const startDukascopyPolling = () => {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        let dSymbol = symbol.replace("_", "/");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (!dSymbol.includes("/")) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (dSymbol.length === 6) dSymbol = dSymbol.slice(0, 3) + "/" + dSymbol.slice(3);

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const socket = io();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        bSocket = socket as any; // Using bSocket ref to clean up later
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        socket.on("connect", () => {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (isCancelled) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          if (quotes && quotes[dSymbol]) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const item = quotes[dSymbol];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const feedTimestamp = item[0] || Date.now();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const tickTime = Math.floor(feedTimestamp / 1000);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const bid = parseFloat(item[1] || item.bid);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const ask = parseFloat(item[2] || item.ask);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            const currentMid = parseFloat(((bid + ask) / 2).toFixed(5));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            aggregateAndAddBar(tickTime, currentMid, 1);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            setPrice(currentMid);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            setPrices(prev => ({ ...prev, [symbol]: currentMid }));
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        });
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return () => {

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const checkCompetitionRules = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (activeAccount?.type === 'competition' && activeAccount.competitionId) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const comp = competitions.find(c => c.id === activeAccount.competitionId);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (comp && comp.isActive) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const now = new Date();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const compStart = new Date(comp.startDate);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        const compEnd = comp.endDate ? new Date(comp.endDate) : null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (now < compStart) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert(`Competition starts on ${compStart.toLocaleDateString()}. You cannot trade until then.`);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (compEnd && now > compEnd) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert(`The competition has ended. You cannot place trades anymore.`);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const isNewsTime = (sym: string) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const events = globalSettings.newsEvents || [];
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const now = new Date().getTime();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    for (const ev of events) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!sym.includes(ev.currency) && ev.currency !== "ALL") continue;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const evTime = new Date(ev.timestamp).getTime();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const startTime = evTime - (15 * 60 * 1000);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const endTime = evTime + (15 * 60 * 1000);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (now >= startTime && now <= endTime) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return true;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const isWeekend = () => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const now = new Date(Date.now() + serverTimeOffset);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const day = now.getUTCDay();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const hour = now.getUTCHours();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    // Standard market close: Friday 21:00 UTC to Sunday 21:00 UTC
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return (day === 6) || (day === 5 && hour >= 21) || (day === 0 && hour < 21);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const isOvernight = (openTime: number) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (!openTime) return false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const openDate = new Date(openTime);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const nowDate = new Date();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return openDate.getUTCDate() !== nowDate.getUTCDate() || 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           openDate.getUTCMonth() !== nowDate.getUTCMonth() || 
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:           openDate.getUTCFullYear() !== nowDate.getUTCFullYear();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const isMarketClosed = (sym: string) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    const isCrypto = TRADING_SYMBOLS["Crypto"].includes(sym);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    if (isCrypto) return false;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    return isWeekend();
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  };
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:  const placeOrder = async (type: "buy" | "sell") => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:    try {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!activeAccount || activeAccount.status === 'failed' || activeAccount.status === 'suspended') {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        alert("⚠️ This account is FAILED or SUSPENDED. Trading is completely disabled.");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (maxAllowedLots > 0 && Lots > maxAllowedLots) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        alert(`Lots (${Lots}) exceeds maximum allowed lots (${Math.floor(maxAllowedLots * 100) / 100}) for your available margin.`);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!checkCompetitionRules()) return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // Rule prevention: No holding weekend for funded (except Crypto)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const isCrypto = TRADING_SYMBOLS["Crypto"].includes(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (activeAccount?.type === 'funded' && isWeekend() && !isCrypto) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert("Funded accounts are not permitted to open non-crypto trades during the weekend.");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (isMarketClosed(symbol)) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         alert("Market is closed. Trading is only available for Crypto pairs during the weekend.");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:         return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const marketPrice = prices[symbol] || price;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (!marketPrice || marketPrice <= 0)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        throw new Error("No price available");
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const config = symbolConfigs.find((c) => c.symbol === symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let currentSpread = config?.spread || 0;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const isNews = isNewsTime(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (isNews) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        currentSpread *= (globalSettings.newsSpreadMultiplier || 10);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const pipSize = getPipSize(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const spreadPoints = currentSpread * pipSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // We apply spread: buy at ask (higher), sell at bid (lower)
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const fillPrice = type === "buy" ? marketPrice + spreadPoints : marketPrice - spreadPoints;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // Margin Requirement Calculation
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      let contractSize = getContractSizeForSymbol(symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const leverage = globalSettings.leverageCap;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const notionalValue = fillPrice * Lots * contractSize;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const requiredMargin = notionalValue / leverage;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      // Free Margin Check
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const usedMargin = positions.reduce((acc, p) => {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        let cs = getContractSizeForSymbol(p.symbol);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return acc + (p.open_price * p.lots * cs) / globalSettings.leverageCap;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }, 0);
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const freeMargin = currentEquity - usedMargin;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (requiredMargin > freeMargin) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        alert(
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          `Insufficient Margin! Needed: $${requiredMargin.toFixed(2)}, Available: $${freeMargin.toFixed(2)}`,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const newSl = sl ? parseFloat(sl) : null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const newTp = tp ? parseFloat(tp) : null;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      if (type === "buy") {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (newSl !== null && newSl >= fillPrice) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert(
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            `Invalid Stop Loss! SL (${newSl}) must be lower than fill price (${fillPrice.toFixed(5)}).`,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (newTp !== null && newTp <= fillPrice) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert(
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            `Invalid Take Profit! TP (${newTp}) must be higher than fill price (${fillPrice.toFixed(5)}).`,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      } else {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (newSl !== null && newSl <= fillPrice) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert(
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            `Invalid Stop Loss! SL (${newSl}) must be higher than fill price (${fillPrice.toFixed(5)}).`,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        if (newTp !== null && newTp >= fillPrice) {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          alert(
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:            `Invalid Take Profit! TP (${newTp}) must be lower than fill price (${fillPrice.toFixed(5)}).`,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          );
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:          return;
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      }
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:      const orderPayload = {
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        user_id: user?.id,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        tradingAccountId: activeAccountId,
src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:        symbol,

src/components/WebTerminal.tsx:

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'logs' && <AuditLogTab logs={auditLogs} />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'risk' && <RiskTab />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'market' && <MarketTab configs={symbolConfigs} onUpdate={updateSymbolConfig} />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'competition' && <CompetitionAdminTab users={users} />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'educators' && <EducatorApprovalsTab />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'bots' && <BotAdminTab />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'referrals' && <ReferralsAdminTab />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'hostes' && <HostesTab users={users} createHostesUser={createHostesUser} addManualTrade={addManualTrade} symbolConfigs={symbolConfigs} competitions={competitions} generateTradingAccount={generateTradingAccount} />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'mt5' && <MT5Tab />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        {activeTab === 'api' && <ApiTab apis={apis} onUpdate={updateAPI} />}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      </div>
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    </div>
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  );
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:export function evaluateAccountCompliance(acc: TradingAccount) {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const history = acc.history || [];
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const initBal = acc.initialBalance || 100000;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const balance = acc.balance || initBal;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const currentProfit = Math.max(0, balance - initBal);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const baseTarget = acc.rules?.profitTarget || (initBal * 0.10);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const penalty = acc.rules?.targetPenalty || 0;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const actualTarget = baseTarget + penalty;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const hasReachedTarget = currentProfit >= actualTarget;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  // Consistency Rule Check
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const dailyProfitsMap: { [date: string]: number } = {};
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  history.forEach((t: any) => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    const d = new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    dailyProfitsMap[d] = (dailyProfitsMap[d] || 0) + parseFloat(t.pnl || 0);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  });
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const maxDailyProfit = Object.values(dailyProfitsMap).length > 0 ? Math.max(0, ...Object.values(dailyProfitsMap)) : 0;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const baseForLimit = acc.type?.startsWith('evaluation') ? baseTarget : currentProfit;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const limit = (baseForLimit || 1) * 0.45;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const isConsistencyViolated = currentProfit > 0 && maxDailyProfit > limit;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  // Minimum 3 trading days check
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const tradingDaysSet = new Set(history.map(t => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    return new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  }));
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const uniqueDaysCount = tradingDaysSet.size;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const tradingDaysPassed = uniqueDaysCount >= 3;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  // Scalping Warnings Count
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const scalpWarnings = acc.scalpWarningsCount || 0;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const scalpPassed = scalpWarnings < 3;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  // Drawdowns failed check
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const isFailed = acc.status === 'failed';
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  // Overall Passed status
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const isFullyEligible = hasReachedTarget && !isConsistencyViolated && tradingDaysPassed && scalpPassed && !isFailed;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  return {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    initBal,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    balance,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    currentProfit,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    actualTarget,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    hasReachedTarget,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    isConsistencyViolated,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    maxDailyProfit,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    limit,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    uniqueDaysCount,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    tradingDaysPassed,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    scalpWarnings,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    scalpPassed,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    isFailed,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    isFullyEligible
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:}
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:function ChallengesPassedTab() {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const { users } = useApp();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [passedAccounts, setPassedAccounts] = useState<any[]>([]);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [selectedAudit, setSelectedAudit] = useState<any | null>(null);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const loadAllAccounts = async () => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    try {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      const accountsWithUsers: any[] = [];
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      const fetchPromises = users.map(async (u) => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        try {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const snap = await getDocs(collection(db, "users", u.id, "tradingAccounts"));
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          return {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:            user: u,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:            accounts: snap.docs.map(d => ({ ...d.data(), id: d.id }) as TradingAccount)
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        } catch (e) {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          console.error("Error loading accounts for user", u.id, e);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          return { user: u, accounts: [] };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      });
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      const results = await Promise.all(fetchPromises);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      results.forEach(({ user: trader, accounts }) => {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:            accountsWithUsers.push({
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:              trader,

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:              compliance,
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:            });
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        });
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      });
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      accountsWithUsers.sort((a,b) => b.compliance.currentProfit - a.compliance.currentProfit);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setPassedAccounts(accountsWithUsers);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      console.error("Error setting up passed challenges:", err);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    loadAllAccounts();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  }, [users]);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const handleApproveUpgrade = async (traderId: string, accId: string) => {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const isEncrypted = (str: string) => /^[0-9a-f]{32}:[0-9a-f]+$/.test(str || "");
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const shouldEncrypt = (key: string) => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    const k = key.toLowerCase();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    if (k.includes('public') || k.includes('publishable') || k.includes('client_id') || k.includes('clientid') || k.includes('interval')) return false;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    return k.includes('secret') || k.includes('private') || k.includes('key') || k.includes('token');
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const handleToggleStatus = async (api: ExternalAPI) => {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const handleSave = async (api: ExternalAPI) => {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          });
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const data = await res.json();

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        } catch (e) {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          console.error("Encryption failed", e);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          updatedConfig[key] = value; // Fallback
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      } else {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        updatedConfig[key] = value;

src/AppContext.tsx:export function AppProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
src/AppContext.tsx:  const [user, setUser] = useState<UserAccount | null>(null);
src/AppContext.tsx:  const [activeAccountId, setActiveAccountId] = useState<string | null>(() => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
src/AppContext.tsx:      return params.get('accountId') || null;
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch {
src/AppContext.tsx:      return null;
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  });
src/AppContext.tsx:  const [isAuthReady, setIsAuthReady] = useState(false);
src/AppContext.tsx:  const [firestoreQuotaExceeded, setFirestoreQuotaExceeded] = useState(false);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
src/AppContext.tsx:      (window as any).__onFirestoreQuotaExceeded = () => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        setFirestoreQuotaExceeded(true);
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:      if ((window as any).__firestoreQuotaExceeded) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        setFirestoreQuotaExceeded(true);
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:    return () => {
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
src/AppContext.tsx:        delete (window as any).__onFirestoreQuotaExceeded;
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    };
src/AppContext.tsx:  }, []);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const [users, setUsers] = useState<UserAccount[]>([]);
src/AppContext.tsx:  const [trades, setTrades] = useState<Trade[]>([]);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (user && user.tradingAccounts) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      let combinedTrades: any[] = [];
src/AppContext.tsx:      user.tradingAccounts.forEach((acc: any) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (acc.history && Array.isArray(acc.history)) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          combinedTrades.push(...acc.history);
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      });
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Sort by close_time descending
src/AppContext.tsx:      combinedTrades.sort((a,b) => (b.close_time || b.timestamp || 0) - (a.close_time || a.timestamp || 0));
src/AppContext.tsx:      setTrades(combinedTrades as Trade[]);
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  }, [user?.tradingAccounts]);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const processingRef = React.useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  // Automated account protection system: monitors user trading accounts in real-time.
src/AppContext.tsx:  // Stops purchased / gifted accounts when limits are exceeded on minus or plus (excluding competition ones).
src/AppContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!user || !user.tradingAccounts || user.tradingAccounts.length === 0) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    user.tradingAccounts.forEach(async (acc: any) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (acc.status !== "active") return;
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (acc.type === "competition") return; // exclude competition accounts: "Inafara de cele de concurs"
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (processingRef.current.has(acc.id)) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const getDeducedInitialBalance = () => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        let ib = acc.initialBalance || 0;
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (ib > 0) return ib;
src/AppContext.tsx:        const currentBal = acc.balance || 10000;
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (acc.rules?.maxDrawdown && acc.rules.maxDrawdown > 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          return acc.rules.maxDrawdown * 10;
src/AppContext.tsx:        } else if (acc.rules?.dailyDrawdown && acc.rules.dailyDrawdown > 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          return acc.rules.dailyDrawdown * 20;
src/AppContext.tsx:        } else {
src/AppContext.tsx:          const standards = [5000, 10000, 25000, 50000, 100000, 200000];
src/AppContext.tsx:          let bestAlloc = 10000;
src/AppContext.tsx:          let minDiff = Infinity;
src/AppContext.tsx:          standards.forEach(s => {
src/AppContext.tsx:            const diff = Math.abs(s - currentBal);
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (diff < minDiff) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              minDiff = diff;
src/AppContext.tsx:              bestAlloc = s;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:          });
src/AppContext.tsx:          return bestAlloc;
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const initialBalance = getDeducedInitialBalance();
src/AppContext.tsx:      const currentBalance = acc.balance || 10000;
src/AppContext.tsx:      const openPnL = (acc.openTrades || []).reduce(
src/AppContext.tsx:        (sum: number, t: any) => sum + parseFloat(t.pnl || 0),
src/AppContext.tsx:        0
src/AppContext.tsx:      );
src/AppContext.tsx:      const currentEquity = currentBalance + openPnL;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Helper to dynamically resolve percentage or absolute dollar limits from admin
src/AppContext.tsx:      const getRuleThresholdValue = (val: any, refBalance: number) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const num = parseFloat(val);
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (isNaN(num) || num <= 0) return 0;
src/AppContext.tsx:        // If value is small (<= 100), treat as percentage, otherwise treat as absolute dollar amount
src/AppContext.tsx:        return num <= 100 ? (refBalance * num) / 100 : num;
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Drawdown limits (pe minus) set dynamically in Admin or falls back to standard 5% / 10%
src/AppContext.tsx:      const maxDrawdownLimit = getRuleThresholdValue(acc.rules?.maxDrawdown, initialBalance) || (initialBalance * 0.10);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const dailyDrawdownLimit = getRuleThresholdValue(acc.rules?.dailyDrawdown, initialBalance) || (initialBalance * 0.05);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const maxLimitBreached = (currentEquity <= (initialBalance - maxDrawdownLimit)) || (currentBalance <= (initialBalance - maxDrawdownLimit));
src/AppContext.tsx:      const dailyLimitBreached = (currentEquity <= (initialBalance - dailyDrawdownLimit)) || (currentBalance <= (initialBalance - dailyDrawdownLimit));
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const isMinusBreached = maxLimitBreached || dailyLimitBreached;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Profit target limits (pe plus) including any dynamic news penalty
src/AppContext.tsx:      const baseProfitTarget = getRuleThresholdValue(acc.rules?.profitTarget, initialBalance) || (initialBalance * 0.10);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const targetPenalty = parseFloat(acc.rules?.targetPenalty || 0);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const actualProfitTarget = baseProfitTarget + targetPenalty;
src/AppContext.tsx:      const currentProfit = currentEquity - initialBalance;
src/AppContext.tsx:      const isPlusBreached = currentProfit >= actualProfitTarget;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Consistency rule calculations (45% outlier of total target)
src/AppContext.tsx:      const history = acc.history || [];
src/AppContext.tsx:      const dailyProfits: { [date: string]: number } = {};
src/AppContext.tsx:      history.forEach((t: any) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const ms = t.close_time || t.timestamp || Date.now();
src/AppContext.tsx:        const d = new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString();
src/AppContext.tsx:        dailyProfits[d] = (dailyProfits[d] || 0) + (t.pnl || 0);
src/AppContext.tsx:      });
src/AppContext.tsx:      const maxDailyProfit = Math.max(0, ...Object.values(dailyProfits));
src/AppContext.tsx:      const consistencyLimitVal = actualProfitTarget * 0.45;
src/AppContext.tsx:      const consistencyViolations = Object.keys(dailyProfits).filter(d => dailyProfits[d] > consistencyLimitVal);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const violatingDaysCount = consistencyViolations.length;
src/AppContext.tsx:      const tradingDays = new Set(history.map(t => new Date(t.timestamp || t.close_time || Date.now()).toLocaleDateString())).size;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Trigger if drawdown limit reached, or multiple consistency violations occurred, or profit target reached
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (isMinusBreached || violatingDaysCount >= 2 || isPlusBreached) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        // Mark as processing to avoid duplicate parallel executions in the render hooks
src/AppContext.tsx:        processingRef.current.add(acc.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (isMinusBreached) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          let breachReason = "";
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (maxLimitBreached) breachReason = `Max Total Drawdown Limit Reached ($${maxDrawdownLimit.toLocaleString()})`;
src/AppContext.tsx:          else if (dailyLimitBreached) breachReason = `Daily Drawdown Limit Reached ($${dailyDrawdownLimit.toLocaleString()})`;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          console.warn(`[Automated Protection] Account #${acc.accountNumber} breached: ${breachReason}. Suspending/stopping account.`);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          // Close active positions at current equity to solidify balance
src/AppContext.tsx:          const nextBalance = currentEquity;
src/AppContext.tsx:          const closedHistory = (acc.openTrades || []).map((p: any) => ({
src/AppContext.tsx:            ...p,
src/AppContext.tsx:            close_time: Date.now(),
src/AppContext.tsx:            close_price: p.open_price, // fallback
src/AppContext.tsx:            pnl: parseFloat(p.pnl || 0),
src/AppContext.tsx:            reason: "Automated Breach Closure"
src/AppContext.tsx:          }));
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          const existingHistory = acc.history || [];
src/AppContext.tsx:          const updatedHistory = [...closedHistory, ...existingHistory];
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          // Notify user
src/AppContext.tsx:          const msg = `⚠️ Account #${acc.accountNumber} failed the drawdown rules limits (${breachReason}) and has been CLOSED (FAILED).`;
src/AppContext.tsx:          try {
src/AppContext.tsx:            alert(msg);
src/AppContext.tsx:          } catch {
src/AppContext.tsx:            // ignore alert blocker
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:            title: "Challenge Failed ❌",
src/AppContext.tsx:            message: `Account #${acc.accountNumber} was closed because it breached the drawdown limit (${breachReason}).`,
src/AppContext.tsx:            type: "alert"
src/AppContext.tsx:          });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          await updateTradingAccount(acc.id, {
src/AppContext.tsx:            status: "failed", // Set status to failed
src/AppContext.tsx:            balance: nextBalance,
src/AppContext.tsx:            openTrades: [],
src/AppContext.tsx:            history: updatedHistory
src/AppContext.tsx:          });
src/AppContext.tsx:        } 
src/AppContext.tsx:        else if (violatingDaysCount >= 2) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          console.warn(`[Automated Protection] Account #${acc.accountNumber} breached consistency rule on 2 different days. Failing account.`);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          const nextBalance = currentEquity;
src/AppContext.tsx:          const closedHistory = (acc.openTrades || []).map((p: any) => ({
src/AppContext.tsx:            ...p,
src/AppContext.tsx:            close_time: Date.now(),
src/AppContext.tsx:            close_price: p.open_price, // fallback
src/AppContext.tsx:            pnl: parseFloat(p.pnl || 0),
src/AppContext.tsx:            reason: "Consistency Rule Exceeded 2 Days"
src/AppContext.tsx:          }));
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          const existingHistory = acc.history || [];
src/AppContext.tsx:          const updatedHistory = [...closedHistory, ...existingHistory];
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          const msg = `❌ Challenge Failed: Account #${acc.accountNumber} has been blocked because you exceeded the 45% consistency rule ($${consistencyLimitVal.toLocaleString()}) on 2 separate days. You can buy another challenge to try again.`;
src/AppContext.tsx:          try {
src/AppContext.tsx:            alert(msg);
src/AppContext.tsx:          } catch {
src/AppContext.tsx:            // ignore alert blocker
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:            title: "Challenge Failed ❌",
src/AppContext.tsx:            message: `Account #${acc.accountNumber} failed: Exceeded consistency rule on 2 different trading days.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:            type: "alert"
src/AppContext.tsx:          });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          await updateTradingAccount(acc.id, {
src/AppContext.tsx:            status: "failed", // Set status to failed
src/AppContext.tsx:            balance: nextBalance,
src/AppContext.tsx:            openTrades: [],
src/AppContext.tsx:            history: updatedHistory,
src/AppContext.tsx:            consistencyWarningsCount: violatingDaysCount
src/AppContext.tsx:          });
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:        else if (isPlusBreached) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          // Verify if they satisfy both: NO consistency violations AND minimum 3 trading days
src/AppContext.tsx:          const isConsistent = violatingDaysCount === 0;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (!isConsistent) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Outlier daily profit exceeds 45% consistency rule limit.
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Do not suspend them, but do not promote. Let them keep trading to dilute outliers.
src/AppContext.tsx:            processingRef.current.delete(acc.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:            console.log(`[Automated Protection] Account #${acc.accountNumber} hit target but violates 45% Consistency (Max Day: $${maxDailyProfit.toFixed(1)} > Limit: $${consistencyLimitVal.toFixed(1)}). Outlier needs to be diluted.`);
src/AppContext.tsx:            return;
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (tradingDays < 3) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Less than 3 trading days. Let them keep trading.
src/AppContext.tsx:            processingRef.current.delete(acc.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:            console.log(`[Automated Protection] Account #${acc.accountNumber} hit target but has only ${tradingDays} trading days. Minimum 3 trading days required.`);
src/AppContext.tsx:            return;
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          // Wholly consistent! Move to transition/elevation
src/AppContext.tsx:          const nextBalance = initialBalance; // reset to initial capital for next phase
src/AppContext.tsx:          const closedHistory = (acc.openTrades || []).map((p: any) => ({
src/AppContext.tsx:            ...p,
src/AppContext.tsx:            close_time: Date.now(),
src/AppContext.tsx:            close_price: p.open_price,

src/AppContext.tsx:            // Phase 1 -> Phase 2 (evaluation-2, 8% target)

src/AppContext.tsx:      } else {

src/AppContext.tsx:    // Trading Accounts
src/AppContext.tsx:    const unsubAccounts = onSnapshot(
src/AppContext.tsx:      query(collection(db, "users", user.id, "tradingAccounts")),
src/AppContext.tsx:      (snap) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const accounts = snap.docs.map((d) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:          const data = d.data() as any;
src/AppContext.tsx:          let changed = false;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          // Self-heal initialBalance if missing or zero
src/AppContext.tsx:          let initialBalance = data.initialBalance || 0;
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (!initialBalance) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            const currentBal = data.balance || 10000;
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (data.rules?.maxDrawdown && data.rules.maxDrawdown > 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              initialBalance = data.rules.maxDrawdown * 10;
src/AppContext.tsx:            } else if (data.rules?.dailyDrawdown && data.rules.dailyDrawdown > 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              initialBalance = data.rules.dailyDrawdown * 20;
src/AppContext.tsx:            } else {
src/AppContext.tsx:              const standards = [5000, 10000, 25000, 50000, 100000, 200000];
src/AppContext.tsx:              let bestAlloc = 10000;
src/AppContext.tsx:              let minDiff = Infinity;
src/AppContext.tsx:              standards.forEach(s => {
src/AppContext.tsx:                const diff = Math.abs(s - currentBal);
src/AppContext.tsx:                if (diff < minDiff) {
src/AppContext.tsx:                  minDiff = diff;
src/AppContext.tsx:                  bestAlloc = s;
src/AppContext.tsx:                }
src/AppContext.tsx:              });
src/AppContext.tsx:              initialBalance = bestAlloc;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:            data.initialBalance = initialBalance;
src/AppContext.tsx:            changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          // Ensure rules exist and convert percentages to absolute dollars if needed
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (!data.rules) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            data.rules = {
src/AppContext.tsx:              maxDrawdown: initialBalance * 0.10,
src/AppContext.tsx:              dailyDrawdown: initialBalance * 0.05,
src/AppContext.tsx:              profitTarget: initialBalance * 0.10,
src/AppContext.tsx:              newsTrading: true,
src/AppContext.tsx:              weekendHolding: true
src/AppContext.tsx:            };
src/AppContext.tsx:            changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:          } else {
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (data.rules.maxDrawdown !== undefined && data.rules.maxDrawdown <= 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              data.rules.maxDrawdown = (initialBalance * data.rules.maxDrawdown) / 100;
src/AppContext.tsx:              changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (data.rules.dailyDrawdown !== undefined && data.rules.dailyDrawdown <= 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              data.rules.dailyDrawdown = (initialBalance * data.rules.dailyDrawdown) / 100;
src/AppContext.tsx:              changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (data.rules.profitTarget !== undefined && data.rules.profitTarget <= 100) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              data.rules.profitTarget = (initialBalance * data.rules.profitTarget) / 100;
src/AppContext.tsx:              changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Ensure they are not 0
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (!data.rules.maxDrawdown) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              data.rules.maxDrawdown = initialBalance * 0.10;
src/AppContext.tsx:              changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (!data.rules.dailyDrawdown) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              data.rules.dailyDrawdown = initialBalance * 0.05;
src/AppContext.tsx:              changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:            if (!data.rules.profitTarget) {
src/AppContext.tsx:              data.rules.profitTarget = initialBalance * 0.10;
src/AppContext.tsx:              changed = true;
src/AppContext.tsx:            }
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (changed) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            updateDoc(doc(db, "users", user.id, "tradingAccounts", d.id), {
src/AppContext.tsx:              initialBalance: data.initialBalance,
src/AppContext.tsx:              rules: data.rules
src/AppContext.tsx:            }).catch(console.error);
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:          return { ...data, id: d.id } as TradingAccount;
src/AppContext.tsx:        });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:        console.log("Fetched and healed trading accounts for user", user.id, ":", accounts);
src/AppContext.tsx:        setUser((prev) =>
src/AppContext.tsx:          prev ? { ...prev, tradingAccounts: accounts } : null,
src/AppContext.tsx:        );
src/AppContext.tsx:      },
src/AppContext.tsx:      (err) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:        handleFirestoreError(
src/AppContext.tsx:          err,
src/AppContext.tsx:          OperationType.LIST,
src/AppContext.tsx:          `users/${user.id}/tradingAccounts`,
src/AppContext.tsx:        );
src/AppContext.tsx:        setUser((prev) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (!prev) return null;
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (prev.tradingAccounts && prev.tradingAccounts.length > 0) return prev;
src/AppContext.tsx:          const fallbackAccs: TradingAccount[] = [
src/AppContext.tsx:            {
src/AppContext.tsx:              id: "eval-acc-quota-fallback-1",
src/AppContext.tsx:              userId: prev.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:              broker: "Prop Firm Broker",
src/AppContext.tsx:              server: "PropFirm-Demo",

src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  // Poll MT5 positions periodically to stay synced with the VPS bridge
src/AppContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!user || user.role === "admin") return;
src/AppContext.tsx:    
src/AppContext.tsx:    const pollMt5 = async () => {
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:      try {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const idToken = await auth.currentUser?.getIdToken();
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (!idToken) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:        const response = await fetch("/api/mt5-positions", {
src/AppContext.tsx:          headers: {
src/AppContext.tsx:            "Authorization": `Bearer ${idToken}`
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:        });
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (response.ok) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          const positions = await response.json();
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (Array.isArray(positions) && activeAccountId) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Find the active account and update its openTrades
src/AppContext.tsx:            setUser(prev => {
src/AppContext.tsx:              if (!prev || !prev.tradingAccounts) return prev;
src/AppContext.tsx:              const updatedAccounts = prev.tradingAccounts.map(acc => {
src/AppContext.tsx:                if (acc.id === activeAccountId) {
src/AppContext.tsx:                  return { ...acc, openTrades: positions };
src/AppContext.tsx:                }
src/AppContext.tsx:                return acc;
src/AppContext.tsx:              });
src/AppContext.tsx:              return { ...prev, tradingAccounts: updatedAccounts };
src/AppContext.tsx:            });
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        // Silently fail if bridge is not responding or not configured
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    const interval = setInterval(pollMt5, 10000);
src/AppContext.tsx:    pollMt5();
src/AppContext.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(interval);
src/AppContext.tsx:  }, [user?.id, activeAccountId]);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const addAuditLog = async (
src/AppContext.tsx:    logData: Omit<AuditLog, "id" | "createdAt" >,
src/AppContext.tsx:  ) => {

src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!auth.currentUser) return; // Must have auth token to log (via backend API requirements)

src/AppContext.tsx:  const loginWithEmail = async (email: string, password: string) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (error: any) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      // If it's the admin email and it doesn't exist, create it automatically for convenience
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (
src/AppContext.tsx:        email === "admin@prop.com" &&
src/AppContext.tsx:        (error.code === "auth/user-not-found" ||
src/AppContext.tsx:          error.code === "auth/invalid-credential")
src/AppContext.tsx:      ) {

src/AppContext.tsx:        await registerWithEmail("Super Admin", email, password);
src/AppContext.tsx:        // Try logging in again after creation
src/AppContext.tsx:        await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);
src/AppContext.tsx:        return;
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:      throw error;
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };

src/AppContext.tsx:  const handleVerificationRequest = async (
src/AppContext.tsx:    requestId: string,
src/AppContext.tsx:    status: "approved" | "rejected",
src/AppContext.tsx:  ) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!isStaff) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      const reqRef = doc(db, "verificationRequests", requestId);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const reqSnap = await getDoc(reqRef);
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!reqSnap.exists()) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      const reqData = reqSnap.data();
src/AppContext.tsx:      await updateDoc(reqRef, { status });
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Update user verification status
src/AppContext.tsx:      const userRef = doc(db, "users", reqData.userId);
src/AppContext.tsx:      await updateDoc(userRef, { 
src/AppContext.tsx:        isVerified: status === 'approved',
src/AppContext.tsx:        verificationStatus: status === 'approved' ? 'verified' : 'rejected'
src/AppContext.tsx:      });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      addAuditLog({
src/AppContext.tsx:        action: `VERIFY_${status.toUpperCase()}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:        actorId: user?.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:        actorName: user?.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:        targetId: reqData.userId,
src/AppContext.tsx:        targetName: reqData.userName,
src/AppContext.tsx:        details: `KYC Request ${status} for ${reqData.userName}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:        type: 'user_management'
src/AppContext.tsx:      });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:        title: status === 'approved' ? "Identity Verified!" : "Verification Rejected",
src/AppContext.tsx:        message: status === 'approved' 
src/AppContext.tsx:          ? "Your identity has been successfully verified. You now have full access to payouts." 
src/AppContext.tsx:          : "Your identity verification was rejected. Please check your documents and try again.",
src/AppContext.tsx:        type: status === 'approved' ? "success" : "alert",
src/AppContext.tsx:      }, reqData.userId);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.UPDATE, `verificationRequests/${requestId}`);
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const updateUser = async (userId: string, data: Partial<UserAccount>) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!isStaff) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:    const ref = doc(db, "users", userId);
src/AppContext.tsx:    
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      const userSnap = await getDoc(ref);
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (userSnap.exists()) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const targetUser = userSnap.data() as UserAccount;
src/AppContext.tsx:        
src/AppContext.tsx:        // SECURITY GATE: Moderators cannot modify Admins
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (isModerator && !isAdmin && targetUser.role === 'admin') {
src/AppContext.tsx:          throw new Error("Access denied: Moderators cannot modify administrator accounts.");
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:        // If role is being changed, we want to log it and notify the user
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (data.role) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (targetUser.role !== data.role) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            console.log(`Role change detected for ${userId}: ${targetUser.role} -> ${data.role}`);
src/AppContext.tsx:            
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Send notification to the target user
src/AppContext.tsx:            await addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:              title: "Role Updated",
src/AppContext.tsx:              message: `Administrator has changed your role to ${data.role.toUpperCase()}.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:              type: "info",
src/AppContext.tsx:            }, userId);
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:            // Log the action
src/AppContext.tsx:            addAuditLog({
src/AppContext.tsx:              action: 'CHANGE_ROLE',
src/AppContext.tsx:              actorId: user?.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:              actorName: user?.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:              actorRole: user?.role as any,
src/AppContext.tsx:              targetId: userId,
src/AppContext.tsx:              targetName: targetUser.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:              details: `Changed role from ${targetUser.role} to ${data.role}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:              type: 'user_management'
src/AppContext.tsx:            });
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Optimistic UI update
src/AppContext.tsx:      setUsers(prev => prev.map(u => u.id === userId ? { ...u, ...data } : u));
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (user?.id === userId) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        setUser(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...data } : null);
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      await updateDoc(ref, data);
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      console.error("Update User Error:", err);
src/AppContext.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.UPDATE, `users/${userId}`);
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:

src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const addManualTrade = async (accountId: string, trade: any, userId: string) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!isAdmin) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Find symbol config for contract size
src/AppContext.tsx:      const config = symbolConfigs.find(c => c.symbol === trade.symbol) || { pipSize: 0.0001, contractSize: 100000 };
src/AppContext.tsx:      const contractSize = config.contractSize || 100000;
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      const priceDiff = trade.type === 'buy' ? trade.exitPrice - trade.entryPrice : trade.entryPrice - trade.exitPrice;
src/AppContext.tsx:      const profit = priceDiff * contractSize * trade.lots;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const newHistoryEntry = {
src/AppContext.tsx:        symbol: trade.symbol,
src/AppContext.tsx:        type: trade.type,
src/AppContext.tsx:        lots: trade.lots,
src/AppContext.tsx:        open_price: trade.entryPrice,
src/AppContext.tsx:        close_price: trade.exitPrice,
src/AppContext.tsx:        sl: trade.sl || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:        tp: trade.tp || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:        timestamp: trade.timestamp,
src/AppContext.tsx:        close_time: trade.closeTime,
src/AppContext.tsx:        profit: parseFloat(profit.toFixed(2)),
src/AppContext.tsx:        isManual: true
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const accountRef = doc(db, "users", userId, "tradingAccounts", accountId);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const accountSnap = await getDoc(accountRef);
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (accountSnap.exists()) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const accData = accountSnap.data();
src/AppContext.tsx:        const history = accData.history || [];
src/AppContext.tsx:        const newBalance = (accData.balance || 0) + profit;
src/AppContext.tsx:        
src/AppContext.tsx:        await updateDoc(accountRef, {
src/AppContext.tsx:          history: [...history, newHistoryEntry],
src/AppContext.tsx:          balance: parseFloat(newBalance.toFixed(2)),
src/AppContext.tsx:          equity: parseFloat(newBalance.toFixed(2))
src/AppContext.tsx:        });
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      addAuditLog({
src/AppContext.tsx:        action: 'ADD_MANUAL_TRADE',
src/AppContext.tsx:        actorId: user?.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:        actorName: user?.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:        details: `Added manual trade to account ${accountId} (Profit: $${profit})`,
src/AppContext.tsx:        type: 'system'
src/AppContext.tsx:      });

src/AppContext.tsx:  const addUser = async (data: Partial<UserAccount>, password: string) => {

src/AppContext.tsx:      // automatically signs in the new user, which will sign out the admin.

src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const generateTradingAccount = async (
src/AppContext.tsx:    pkg: ShopPackage,
src/AppContext.tsx:    platform: TradingPlatform,
src/AppContext.tsx:    type: "evaluation" | "funded" | "competition",
src/AppContext.tsx:    targetUserId?: string,
src/AppContext.tsx:    competitionId?: string
src/AppContext.tsx:  ) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    const userId = targetUserId || user?.id;
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!userId) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    const accountRef = doc(collection(db, "users", userId, "tradingAccounts"));
src/AppContext.tsx:    const newAcc: any = {
src/AppContext.tsx:      id: accountRef.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:      userId,
src/AppContext.tsx:      platform,
src/AppContext.tsx:      accountNumber: `700${Math.floor(10000 + Math.random() * 90000)}${Date.now().toString().slice(-2)}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:      broker: "FundedGoo Markets",
src/AppContext.tsx:      server: "FundedGoo-Live",
src/AppContext.tsx:      status: "active",
src/AppContext.tsx:      leverage: pkg.leverage || "1:100",
src/AppContext.tsx:      type,
src/AppContext.tsx:      createdAt: Date.now(),
src/AppContext.tsx:      balance: pkg.allocation || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:      equity: pkg.allocation || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:      initialBalance: pkg.allocation || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:      initialFee: pkg.price || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:      feeRefunded: false,
src/AppContext.tsx:      openTrades: [],
src/AppContext.tsx:      history: [],
src/AppContext.tsx:      rules: {
src/AppContext.tsx:        maxDrawdown: pkg.totalDrawdown
src/AppContext.tsx:          ? (pkg.allocation * pkg.totalDrawdown) / 100
src/AppContext.tsx:          : pkg.allocation * 0.1 || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:        dailyDrawdown: pkg.dailyDrawdown
src/AppContext.tsx:          ? (pkg.allocation * pkg.dailyDrawdown) / 100
src/AppContext.tsx:          : pkg.allocation * 0.05 || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:        profitTarget: pkg.profitTarget
src/AppContext.tsx:          ? (pkg.allocation * pkg.profitTarget) / 100
src/AppContext.tsx:          : pkg.allocation * 0.1 || 0,
src/AppContext.tsx:        consistencyRule: 0.45,
src/AppContext.tsx:        newsTrading: pkg.newsTrading ?? true,
src/AppContext.tsx:        weekendHolding: pkg.weekendHolding ?? true,
src/AppContext.tsx:      },
src/AppContext.tsx:    };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (competitionId) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      newAcc.competitionId = competitionId;
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      await setDoc(accountRef, newAcc);
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Deduct balance if price > 0 and user is the one paying
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (pkg.price > 0 && userId === user?.id) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const userRef = doc(db, "users", userId);
src/AppContext.tsx:        const newBalance = (user?.balance || 0) - pkg.price;
src/AppContext.tsx:        await updateDoc(userRef, { balance: newBalance });
src/AppContext.tsx:        
src/AppContext.tsx:        // Also create a transaction record
src/AppContext.tsx:        try {
src/AppContext.tsx:          const authUser = auth.currentUser;
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (authUser) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            const idToken = await authUser.getIdToken();
src/AppContext.tsx:            await createTransaction({
src/AppContext.tsx:              userId: userId,
src/AppContext.tsx:              userName: user?.name || "Trader",
src/AppContext.tsx:              amount: pkg.price,
src/AppContext.tsx:              type: 'purchase',
src/AppContext.tsx:              status: 'completed',
src/AppContext.tsx:              createdAt: Date.now(),
src/AppContext.tsx:              description: `Entry fee for ${pkg.name}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:              packageId: pkg.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:            }, idToken);
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:        } catch (txErr) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          console.error("Failed to create transaction record:", txErr);
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Update local state immediately for better UX
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (userId === user?.id) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        setUser((prev) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (!prev) return null;
src/AppContext.tsx:          const accounts = prev.tradingAccounts || [];
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (accounts.some(a => a.id === newAcc.id)) return prev;
src/AppContext.tsx:          return {
src/AppContext.tsx:            ...prev,
src/AppContext.tsx:            balance: prev.balance - (pkg.price || 0),
src/AppContext.tsx:            tradingAccounts: [...accounts, newAcc],
src/AppContext.tsx:          };
src/AppContext.tsx:        });
src/AppContext.tsx:        
src/AppContext.tsx:        // Add notification automatically
src/AppContext.tsx:        const notifRef = doc(collection(db, "users", userId, "notifications"));
src/AppContext.tsx:        const notif = {
src/AppContext.tsx:          id: notifRef.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:          title: "Account provisioned",
src/AppContext.tsx:          message: `Your ${type === 'competition' ? 'Competition' : type} account #${newAcc.accountNumber} ($${newAcc.balance.toLocaleString()}) is ready.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:          type: "success",
src/AppContext.tsx:          createdAt: Date.now(),
src/AppContext.tsx:          read: false
src/AppContext.tsx:        };
src/AppContext.tsx:        await setDoc(notifRef, notif);
src/AppContext.tsx:      } else {
src/AppContext.tsx:        // Also update the users state if it's not the current user
src/AppContext.tsx:        setUsers(prev => prev.map(u => {
src/AppContext.tsx:          if (u.id === userId) {
src/AppContext.tsx:            return {
src/AppContext.tsx:              ...u,
src/AppContext.tsx:              tradingAccounts: [...(u.tradingAccounts || []), newAcc]
src/AppContext.tsx:            };
src/AppContext.tsx:          }
src/AppContext.tsx:          return u;
src/AppContext.tsx:        }));
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      return newAcc;
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      console.error("Firestore failed to save account:", e.message || e);
src/AppContext.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.CREATE, `users/${userId}/tradingAccounts/${accountRef.id}`);
src/AppContext.tsx:      throw e;
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const updateTradingAccount = async (
src/AppContext.tsx:    acctId: string,
src/AppContext.tsx:    data: Partial<TradingAccount>,
src/AppContext.tsx:  ) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!user) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    // Optimistic UI update
src/AppContext.tsx:    setUser((prev) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!prev) return null;
src/AppContext.tsx:      return {
src/AppContext.tsx:        ...prev,
src/AppContext.tsx:        tradingAccounts:
src/AppContext.tsx:          prev.tradingAccounts?.map((a) =>
src/AppContext.tsx:            a.id === acctId ? { ...a, ...data } : a,
src/AppContext.tsx:          ) || [],
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:    });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      const accountRef = doc(db, "users", user.id, "tradingAccounts", acctId);
src/AppContext.tsx:      const snap = await getDoc(accountRef);
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (snap.exists()) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        await updateDoc(accountRef, data);
src/AppContext.tsx:      } else {
src/AppContext.tsx:        console.warn(`Attempted to update non-existent account ${acctId}. If this was just created, it might be a sync issue.`);
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      console.error("Firestore failed for account update", e.message || e);
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const linkPaymentMethod = async (card: { last4: string; brand: string; cardholderName: string; expiryMonth: number; expiryYear: number }) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!user) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:    const ref = doc(db, "users", user.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:    const data = {
src/AppContext.tsx:      linkedPaymentMethod: {
src/AppContext.tsx:        ...card,
src/AppContext.tsx:        isVerified: true
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    };
src/AppContext.tsx:    
src/AppContext.tsx:    setUser(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...data } : null);
src/AppContext.tsx:    await updateDoc(ref, data);
src/AppContext.tsx:    
src/AppContext.tsx:    addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:      title: "Card Saved",
src/AppContext.tsx:      message: `${card.brand} card ending in ${card.last4} has been saved for payouts.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:      type: "success"
src/AppContext.tsx:    });
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    addAuditLog({
src/AppContext.tsx:      action: 'LINK_PAYMENT_METHOD',
src/AppContext.tsx:      actorId: user.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:      actorName: user.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:      details: `Card linked: ${card.brand} ****${card.last4}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:      type: 'financial'
src/AppContext.tsx:    });
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const processReferral = async (referrerCode: string, buyerName: string, pkgId: string) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    const pkg = packages.find(p => p.id === pkgId);
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!pkg) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      const usersRef = collection(db, "users");
src/AppContext.tsx:      const q = query(usersRef, where("referralCode", "==", referrerCode));
src/AppContext.tsx:      const querySnap = await getDocs(q);
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (querySnap.empty) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      const referrerDoc = querySnap.docs[0];
src/AppContext.tsx:      const referrerData = referrerDoc.data() as UserAccount;
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      const newReferral: ReferralRecord = {
src/AppContext.tsx:        id: `ref-${Date.now()}`,
src/AppContext.tsx:        userName: buyerName,
src/AppContext.tsx:        purchaseAmount: pkg.price,
src/AppContext.tsx:        packageTitle: pkg.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
src/AppContext.tsx:        allocation: pkg.allocation
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      const updatedReferrals = [...(referrerData.referrals || []), newReferral];
src/AppContext.tsx:      await updateDoc(referrerDoc.ref, { referrals: updatedReferrals });
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Auto-award rewards based on config
src/AppContext.tsx:      const refConfig = globalSettings.referralConfig || {
src/AppContext.tsx:        enabled: true,
src/AppContext.tsx:        rewardTier1Amount: 5000,
src/AppContext.tsx:        rewardTier1MinPurchase: 10000,
src/AppContext.tsx:        rewardTier2ReferralCount: 10,
src/AppContext.tsx:        rewardTier2Amount: 100000
src/AppContext.tsx:      };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!refConfig.enabled) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      const validReferralsCount = updatedReferrals.filter(
src/AppContext.tsx:        (r) => (r.allocation || 0) >= refConfig.rewardTier1MinPurchase
src/AppContext.tsx:      ).length;
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (pkg.allocation >= refConfig.rewardTier1MinPurchase) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const giftPkg = packages.find(p => p.allocation === refConfig.rewardTier1Amount) || packages.find(p => p.allocation >= refConfig.rewardTier1Amount) || packages[0];
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (giftPkg) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          await generateTradingAccount(giftPkg, 'GOO', 'evaluation', referrerData.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:          addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:            title: "Referral Gift!",
src/AppContext.tsx:            message: `You earned a free $${refConfig.rewardTier1Amount.toLocaleString()} account because ${buyerName} purchased a qualifying account.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:            type: "success"
src/AppContext.tsx:          }, referrerData.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (validReferralsCount > 0 && validReferralsCount % refConfig.rewardTier2ReferralCount === 0 && pkg.allocation >= refConfig.rewardTier1MinPurchase) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const bigGiftPkg = packages.find(p => p.allocation === refConfig.rewardTier2Amount) || packages.find(p => p.allocation >= refConfig.rewardTier2Amount) || packages[0];
src/AppContext.tsx:        if (bigGiftPkg) {
src/AppContext.tsx:          await generateTradingAccount(bigGiftPkg, 'GOO', 'evaluation', referrerData.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:          addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:            title: "Referral Achievement!",
src/AppContext.tsx:            message: `${refConfig.rewardTier2ReferralCount} qualifying referrals reached! You've been awarded a free $${refConfig.rewardTier2Amount.toLocaleString()} account.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:            type: "success"
src/AppContext.tsx:          }, referrerData.id);
src/AppContext.tsx:        }
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      console.error("Referral process error:", e);
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const incrementPromoUsage = async (code: string) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!code) return;
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      const q = query(collection(db, 'promotions'), where('discountCode', '==', code.toUpperCase()));
src/AppContext.tsx:      const snap = await getDocs(q);
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!snap.empty) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const docRef = doc(db, 'promotions', snap.docs[0].id);
src/AppContext.tsx:        const currentCount = snap.docs[0].data().usageCount || 0;
src/AppContext.tsx:        await updateDoc(docRef, { usageCount: currentCount + 1 });
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      console.error("Promo increment error:", e);
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const applyAsEducator = async (bio: string, socialLinks: {twitter?: string; youtube?: string; instagram?: string; website?: string}) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (!user) throw new Error("Not logged in");
src/AppContext.tsx:    const newEducator: any = {
src/AppContext.tsx:      userId: user.id,
src/AppContext.tsx:      name: user.name,
src/AppContext.tsx:      bio,
src/AppContext.tsx:      socialLinks,
src/AppContext.tsx:      tier: 'bronze',
src/AppContext.tsx:      status: 'pending',
src/AppContext.tsx:      courses: [],
src/AppContext.tsx:      createdAt: Date.now()
src/AppContext.tsx:    };
src/AppContext.tsx:    try {
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Allow firebase to auto-generate ID, but document ID must match the ID field usually, 
src/AppContext.tsx:      // or we can use setDoc with a random ID or user ID. Let's use collection(db, "educators")
src/AppContext.tsx:      const docRef = doc(collection(db, "educators"));
src/AppContext.tsx:      newEducator.id = docRef.id;
src/AppContext.tsx:      await setDoc(docRef, newEducator);
src/AppContext.tsx:      
src/AppContext.tsx:      // Notify admins
src/AppContext.tsx:      addNotification({
src/AppContext.tsx:        title: "New Educator Application",
src/AppContext.tsx:        message: `${user.name} applied to be an educator.`,
src/AppContext.tsx:        type: "alert"
src/AppContext.tsx:      }, "admin");
src/AppContext.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/AppContext.tsx:      console.error("Error applying as educator:", error);
src/AppContext.tsx:      throw error;
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
src/AppContext.tsx:  const handleSetActiveView = (view: AppView) => {
src/AppContext.tsx:    if (view === "web-terminal") {
src/AppContext.tsx:      let isStandalone = false;
src/AppContext.tsx:      try {
src/AppContext.tsx:        isStandalone = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('view') === 'web-terminal';
src/AppContext.tsx:      } catch (e) {}
src/AppContext.tsx:      if (!isStandalone) {
src/AppContext.tsx:        const accountParam = activeAccountId ? `&accountId=${activeAccountId}` : '';
src/AppContext.tsx:        window.open(`/?view=web-terminal${accountParam}`, "_blank");
src/AppContext.tsx:        return;
src/AppContext.tsx:      }
src/AppContext.tsx:    }
src/AppContext.tsx:    setActiveView(view);
src/AppContext.tsx:  };
src/AppContext.tsx:
