src/mockData.ts:export const MOCK_RULES: SiteRules = {
src/mockData.ts:  updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
src/mockData.ts:  content: `# FUNDEDGOO PROPRIETARY TRADING PROTOCOL
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:## 1. PROFIT TARGET
src/mockData.ts:Traders must achieve a 10% profit target for Phase 1 and 5% for Phase 2. Once these targets are reached on Funded accounts, you are eligible for profit sharing.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:## 2. MAXIMUM LOSS & DRAWDOWN
src/mockData.ts:- **Maximum Daily Drawdown**: 5% of the starting balance of the day.
src/mockData.ts:- **Maximum Total Drawdown**: 10% of the initial account balance.
src/mockData.ts:*Breaching these limits results in immediate account termination.*
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:## 3. THE 45% CONSISTENCY PROTOCOL (EVALUATION ONLY)
src/mockData.ts:To ensure high-quality and sustainable trading performance during the Evaluation phase, we implement a 45% Consistency Rule. Note: This rule applies exclusively to Phase 1 and Phase 2 challenges. Once you advance to a Funded account, this rule is no longer applied.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:### What is the 45% Rule?
src/mockData.ts:No single trading day's net profit can exceed 45% of your total profit at the time of your challenge completion. This ensures your success is based on consistent trading rather than a single outlier event.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:### How to Calculate Your Limit
src/mockData.ts:Traders can calculate their maximum allowed daily profit using this formula:
src/mockData.ts:**[Total Current Profit] × 0.45 = Max Daily Profit Cap**
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:*Example:* 
src/mockData.ts:If your total profit is **$10,000**, your limit is **$4,500**. If you made **$5,000** in one day, you have breached the consistency protocol.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:### Breach Consequences & How to "Heal"
src/mockData.ts:If the consistency limit is exceeded, you have two options to resolve the breach:
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:1. **Dilution (The "Trading" Solution)**: Continue trading profitably across multiple days. Since the 45% cap is based on the **Total Profit**, increasing your total profit through consistent smaller wins will eventually raise the allowed cap above your "outlier" day's profit.
src/mockData.ts:   * *Required Total Profit = [Outlier Day Profit] ÷ 0.45*
src/mockData.ts:2. **Profit Adjustment (The "Payout" Solution)**: At the time of payout, the system will automatically deduct the "excess" profit from your outlier day to bring you back into the 45% compliance. You will only be paid up to the allowed cap for that day.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:## 4. FEE REFUND POLICY
src/mockData.ts:Your initial evaluation fee is 100% refundable. This refund is added to your **first successful payout** from a Funded account.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:## 5. TRADING STYLE
src/mockData.ts:- **HFT**: Prohibited.
src/mockData.ts:- **News Trading**: Allowed only when specified in account rules. If prohibited, profits from news trades will be deducted as a penalty.
src/mockData.ts:- **Weekend Holding**: Forbidden on Funded accounts. All positions must be closed before the Friday market close (21:00 UTC).
src/mockData.ts:- **Crypto Trading**: Available 24/7, including weekends. However, **Overnight Holding** for Crypto positions during weekends is strictly prohibited and will result in an immediate rule breach.
src/mockData.ts:- **Minimum Trading Days**: 5 days per phase.
src/mockData.ts:
src/mockData.ts:## 6. PAYOUTS
src/mockData.ts:Payouts are processed every 14 days. We distribute an **80% Profit Split** to the trader. Minimum withdrawal is $100.`
src/mockData.ts:};

src/lib/postgres.ts:export const fetchTransactions = async (token?: string): Promise<Transaction[]> => {
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const headers: HeadersInit = {};
src/lib/postgres.ts:  if (token) (headers as any)['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
src/lib/postgres.ts:  
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const res = await fetch('/api/tx-data', { headers });
src/lib/postgres.ts:  if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch transactions');
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const contentType = res.headers.get("content-type");
src/lib/postgres.ts:  if (!contentType || !contentType.includes("application/json")) {
src/lib/postgres.ts:    return [];
src/lib/postgres.ts:  }
src/lib/postgres.ts:  return res.json();
src/lib/postgres.ts:};
src/lib/postgres.ts:

src/lib/postgres.ts:
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const res = await fetch('/api/sys-logs', { headers });

src/lib/postgres.ts:    return [];

src/lib/postgres.ts:export const createTransaction = async (data: any, token?: string): Promise<Transaction> => {
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const headers: HeadersInit = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' };
src/lib/postgres.ts:  if (token) (headers as any)['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
src/lib/postgres.ts:
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const res = await fetch('/api/tx-data', {
src/lib/postgres.ts:    method: 'POST',
src/lib/postgres.ts:    headers,
src/lib/postgres.ts:    body: JSON.stringify(data),
src/lib/postgres.ts:  });
src/lib/postgres.ts:  if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to create transaction');
src/lib/postgres.ts:  return res.json();
src/lib/postgres.ts:};

src/lib/postgres.ts:export const createAuditLog = async (data: any, token?: string): Promise<AuditLog | null> => {
src/lib/postgres.ts:  const headers: HeadersInit = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' };
src/lib/postgres.ts:  if (token) (headers as any)['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
src/lib/postgres.ts:
src/lib/postgres.ts:  try {
src/lib/postgres.ts:    const res = await fetch('/api/sys-logs', {
src/lib/postgres.ts:      method: 'POST',
src/lib/postgres.ts:      headers,
src/lib/postgres.ts:      body: JSON.stringify(data),
src/lib/postgres.ts:    });
src/lib/postgres.ts:    if (!res.ok) {
src/lib/postgres.ts:      const errText = await res.text();
src/lib/postgres.ts:      console.warn(`Failed to create audit log: [${res.status}] ${errText}`);
src/lib/postgres.ts:      return null;
src/lib/postgres.ts:    }
src/lib/postgres.ts:    return res.json();
src/lib/postgres.ts:  } catch(e) {
src/lib/postgres.ts:    console.warn("Network error creating audit log");
src/lib/postgres.ts:    return null;
src/lib/postgres.ts:  }

src/AuthPage.tsx:      if (err.code === 'auth/invalid-credential') {
src/AuthPage.tsx:        setError('Invalid credentials. If this is a new account, please click "Register" first.');
src/AuthPage.tsx:      } else if (err.code === 'auth/email-already-in-use') {
src/AuthPage.tsx:        setError('This email is already registered. Please login instead.');
src/AuthPage.tsx:      } else if (err.code === 'auth/weak-password') {
src/AuthPage.tsx:        setError('Password is too weak. Please use at least 6 characters.');

src/AuthPage.tsx:        setError('Invalid email format.');
src/AuthPage.tsx:      } else {
src/AuthPage.tsx:        setError(`Authentication failed: ${err.message || 'Unknown error'}`);
src/AuthPage.tsx:      }
src/AuthPage.tsx:    } finally {
src/AuthPage.tsx:      if (!window.location.hash.includes('access_token')) {
src/AuthPage.tsx:         setLoading(false);
src/AuthPage.tsx:      }

src/firebase.ts:interface FirestoreErrorInfo {
src/firebase.ts:  error: string;
src/firebase.ts:  operationType: OperationType;
src/firebase.ts:  path: string | null;
src/firebase.ts:  authInfo: any;
src/firebase.ts:}
src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/firebase.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/firebase.ts:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/firebase.ts:    authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/firebase.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/firebase.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/firebase.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/firebase.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/firebase.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData?.map(provider => ({
src/firebase.ts:        providerId: provider.providerId,
src/firebase.ts:        email: provider.email,
src/firebase.ts:      })) || []
src/firebase.ts:    },
src/firebase.ts:    operationType,
src/firebase.ts:    path
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:  const errMsg = String(errInfo.error).toLowerCase();
src/firebase.ts:  const isQuota = errMsg.includes('quota') || errMsg.includes('resource_exhausted') || errMsg.includes('limit exceeded') || errMsg.includes('exceeded');
src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:  if (isQuota) {
src/firebase.ts:    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
src/firebase.ts:      (window as any).__firestoreQuotaExceeded = true;
src/firebase.ts:      if ((window as any).__onFirestoreQuotaExceeded) {
src/firebase.ts:        try {
src/firebase.ts:          (window as any).__onFirestoreQuotaExceeded();
src/firebase.ts:        } catch (e) {}
src/firebase.ts:      }
src/firebase.ts:    }
src/firebase.ts:    // Prevent unhandled exception overlay from freezing the browser UI when quota is exceeded
src/firebase.ts:    return;
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:  
src/firebase.ts:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:}
src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:export { OperationType };
src/firebase.ts:

src/firebase.ts:    await getDocFromServer(doc(db, 'test', 'connection'));

src/firebase.ts:    if(error instanceof Error && error.message.includes('the client is offline')) {
src/firebase.ts:      console.error("Please check your Firebase configuration.");
src/firebase.ts:    }
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:}

SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:# Analiză Aplicație
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:Această aplicație este o aplicație full-stack (React frontend, Express backend) care utilizează Firebase Firestore ca bază de date și Stripe pentru procesarea plăților.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:## Baza de Date (Firestore)
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:- **Logica**: Este o bază de date NoSQL. Structura datelor este definită în `firebase-blueprint.json`. Aceasta este o reprezentare intermediară și nu este sursa de adevăr, dar este folosită pentru a menține consistența.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:- **Securitate**: Regulile de acces sunt definite în `firestore.rules`. Acestea trebuie să fie întotdeauna sincronizate cu structura din `firebase-blueprint.json` pentru a asigura securitatea datelor.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:## API Keys și Securitate
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:- **Configurație Firebase**: Detaliile de configurare (apiKey, projectId, etc.) sunt în `firebase-applet-config.json`. Acestea sunt necesare pe client pentru autentificare și interacțiunea cu Firestore.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:- **Stripe**:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - **Gestionare Cheie**: Aplicația încearcă să obțină cheia secretă Stripe (decriptată) din colecția `apis/api-stripe` din Firestore.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - **Fallback**: Dacă nu reușește, folosește variabila de mediu `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` de pe server (`server.ts`).
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:## Funcționalitate și Salvare
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:- **Frontend**: Scris în React, utilizează hook-uri (ex: `AppContext.tsx`) pentru a comunica cu Firebase. Salvarea datelor se face prin apeluri directe către Firebase SDK (de ex: `setDoc`, `updateDoc`).
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:- **Backend (Server)**:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - `server.ts` este punctul de intrare.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Gestionează rutele API pentru checkout (Stripe) și log-uri de audit/tranzacții.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Rulează pe portul 3000.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:## Mutare Aplicație (Migrare)
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:Pentru a muta aplicația pe un nou host/găzduire, urmează acești pași:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:1. **Dependențe**: Instalează dependențele (`npm install`) și asigură-te că `node_modules` este corect populat.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:2. **Mediu (Environment)**:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Configurează variabilele de mediu necesare în `.env` (folosește `.env.example` ca referință).
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Asigură-te că `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` este setată dacă nu folosești Firebase pentru stocarea cheii.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:3. **Firebase**:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Configurează un nou proiect Firebase dacă este necesar sau actualizează `firebase-applet-config.json` cu noile detalii.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Trebuie să activezi Firestore Enterprise Edition și Firebase Auth (Google Provider).
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - **IMPORTANT**: Trebuie să deployezi regulile de securitate (`firestore.rules`) în consolă sau folosind CLI-ul Firebase.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:4. **Server**:
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Aplicația trebuie pornită folosind `npm start` (care execută `node server.ts` sau echivalent).
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:    - Asigură-te că host-ul acceptă portul 3000.
SYSTEM_ANALYSIS.txt:5. **Build**:

RAILWAY_SETUP.md:# Ghid Configurare Railway - FundedGoo
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:Acest document explică cum să muți aplicația de pe AI Studio pe Railway și cum să configurezi bazele de date (Firestore și PostgreSQL).
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:## 1. Pregătire GitHub & Railway
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:1. **Push pe GitHub**: Folosește opțiunea "Export to GitHub" din meniul AI Studio (Settings).
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:2. **Conectare Railway**: Mergi pe [railway.app](https://railway.app), loghează-te cu GitHub și alege "New Project" -> "Deploy from GitHub repo".
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:3. **Setări Build**: Railway va detecta automat `package.json`. Asigură-te că portul este setat pe `3000`.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:---
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:## 2. Configurare Firestore (Firebase) pe Railway
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:Deoarece Firestore este un serviciu extern (Google), nu îl vei "instala" pe Railway, ci vei conecta aplicația ta la proiectul existent folosind **Environment Variables**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:### Pași:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:1. Mergi în **Firebase Console** -> Project Settings -> **Service Accounts**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:2. Apasă pe **"Generate New Private Key"**. Se va descărca un fișier `.json`.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:3. Deschide acel fișier și copiază tot conținutul (este un obiect JSON).
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:4. În Railway, mergi la tab-ul **Variables** și adaugă:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT`: (Paste la tot conținutul JSON-ului de mai sus)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY`: (Cheia ta SECRETĂ de la Stripe, începe cu `sk_...`)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `ENCRYPTION_KEY`: (Cheie secretă pentru criptare. DACĂ AI SALVAT CHEI ÎN ADMIN PANEL PE AI STUDIO, folosește aceeași cheie și aici!)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `DATABASE_URL`: (Se generează automat dacă adaugi PostgreSQL în Railway)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY`: (Din Firebase Console -> Settings -> General -> Web App Config)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN`: (Din Firebase Console)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID`: (Din Firebase Console)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET`: (Din Firebase Console)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID`: (Din Firebase Console)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID`: (Din Firebase Console)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `SMTP_HOST`: (ex: smtp.gmail.com)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `SMTP_PORT`: (ex: 587)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `SMTP_USER`: (email-ul de pe care trimiți)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `SMTP_PASS`: (parola de aplicație pentru email)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - `APP_URL`: (URL-ul tău de pe Railway, ex: https://proiectul-tau.up.railway.app)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:---
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:## 3. Configurare PostgreSQL pe Railway
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:Codul serverului este deja configurat să folosească variabila `DATABASE_URL` (pe care Railway o injectează automat după ce adaugi baza de date). Tabelele necesare (`sql_transactions`, `sql_user_verifications`, etc.) sunt create automat de server la pornire.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:1. În proiectul tău Railway, apasă pe **"Add"** -> **"Database"** -> **"Add PostgreSQL"**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:---
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:## 4. Email de Confirmare (Custom Flow)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:Am adăugat suport pentru trimiterea de email-uri de confirmare folosind PostgreSQL pentru stocarea token-urilor:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:- Endpoint-ul `/api/auth/send-verification` (POST) generează un token și trimite email.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:- Endpoint-ul `/api/auth/verify-email` (GET) confirmă token-ul în baza de date SQL.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:## 5. !!! CRITIC - CONFIGURARE OBLIGATORIE FIREBASE (EVITARE ERORI AUTH/PERMISSION) !!!
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:PENTRU CA APLICAȚIA SĂ FUNCȚIONEZE CORECT ȘI SĂ NU AI ERORI LA LOGIN SAU PERMISIUNI, URMEAZĂ ACEȘTI PAȘI ÎN CONSOLA FIREBASE:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:### A. ACTIVARE LOGIN (AUTH ERROR: OPERATION-NOT-ALLOWED)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:1. MERGI ÎN **FIREBASE CONSOLE** -> **AUTHENTICATION** -> **SIGN-IN METHOD**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:2. APASĂ PE **ADD NEW PROVIDER**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:3. ALEGE **EMAIL/PASSWORD** ȘI DĂ-I **ENABLE**. 
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - *FĂRĂ ACEST PAS, NIMENI NU SE POATE LOGA SAU ÎNREGISTRA!*
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:### B. CONFIGURARE FIRESTORE RULES (PERMISSION DENIED)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:1. COPIAZĂ TOT CONȚINUTUL FIȘIERULUI `firestore.rules` DIN ACEST PROIECT.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:2. MERGI ÎN **FIREBASE CONSOLE** -> **FIRESTORE DATABASE** -> TAB-UL **RULES**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:3. ȘTERGE CE E ACOLO ȘI DĂ **PASTE** LA CODUL DIN PROIECT.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:4. APASĂ **PUBLISH**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:   - *REGULILE DIN ACEST PROIECT INCLUD HARDCODĂRI PENTRU ADMIN (admin@prop.com), FĂRĂ ELE NU VEI PUTEA ACCESA BAZA DE DATE!*
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:### C. ADĂUGARE ADMIN MANUAL (DACĂ ESTE NEVOIE)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:DACĂ TE-AI LOGAT CU UN ALT EMAIL ȘI VREI ACCES TOTAL:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:1. MERGI ÎN **FIRESTORE DATABASE** -> **DATA**.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:2. CREEAZĂ O COLECȚIE NOUĂ NUMITĂ `admins`.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:3. ADĂUGĂ UN DOCUMENT ÎN EA UNDE **DOCUMENT ID** ESTE `USER_ID`-UL TĂU (ÎL GĂSEȘTI ÎN TAB-UL AUTHENTICATION).
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:4. LASĂ DOCUMENTUL GOL, EXISTENȚA LUI E SUFICIENTĂ PENTRU PERMISIUNI DE ADMIN.
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:---
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:## 6. Fluxul de lucru (CD)
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:- Ori de câte ori faci `git push` în repo-ul tău de GitHub, Railway va vedea schimbarea și va re-deploy-a automat aplicația (Continuous Deployment).
RAILWAY_SETUP.md:- Nu uita să adaugi variabilele de mediu în Railway înainte de primul deploy reușit!

MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:# MetaTrader 5 VPS Bridge Setup Guide
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:To connect your web platform to a real MetaTrader 5 account running on a VPS, follow these steps exactly.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:## 1. Prepare your VPS
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:- Recommended: **Windows VPS** (MT5 runs natively on Windows).
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:- Install **MetaTrader 5** and login with your real account.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:- **IMPORTANT**: Keep the terminal open 24/7 or use a task scheduler to restart it on boot.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:## 2. Install Python Environment
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:On your VPS, install Python 3.8 or higher. Then install the required libraries:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:```bash
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:pip install MetaTrader5 Flask flask-cors
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:```
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:## 3. Create the Bridge Script (`bridge.py`)
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:Create a file named `bridge.py` and paste the following code. This script includes security checks and the positions endpoint required for synchronization.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:```python
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:from flask import Flask, request, jsonify
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:from flask_cors import CORS
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:import MetaTrader5 as mt5
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:import os
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:app = Flask(__name__)
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:CORS(app)
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:# --- CONFIGURATION ---
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:# Set the same secret as your MT5_BRIDGE_SECRET in .env
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:BRIDGE_TOKEN = "YOUR_SECURE_TOKEN_HERE" 
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:# Conectare la MT5 la pornire
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:if not mt5.initialize():
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    print("Eroare conectare MT5. Ensure MT5 terminal is open.")
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    quit()
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:def check_auth():
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    token = request.headers.get('X-Bridge-Token')
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    if token != BRIDGE_TOKEN:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        return False
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    return True
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:@app.route('/place_trade', methods=['POST'])
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:def place_trade():
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    if not check_auth():
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        return jsonify({"success": False, "message": "Unauthorized"}), 401
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    data = request.json
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    symbol = data['symbol']
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    order_type = data['type']  # "BUY" sau "SELL"
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    volume = float(data['volume'])
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    sl = float(data.get('sl', 0))
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    tp = float(data.get('tp', 0))
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    # Check if symbol exists
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    symbol_info = mt5.symbol_info(symbol)
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    if symbol_info is None:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        return jsonify({"success": False, "message": f"Symbol {symbol} not found"}), 404
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    price = mt5.symbol_info_tick(symbol).ask if order_type == "BUY" else mt5.symbol_info_tick(symbol).bid
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    request_dict = {
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "action": mt5.TRADE_ACTION_DEAL,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "symbol": symbol,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "volume": volume,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "type": mt5.ORDER_TYPE_BUY if order_type == "BUY" else mt5.ORDER_TYPE_SELL,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "price": price,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "sl": sl,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "tp": tp,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "deviation": 30,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "magic": 987654,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "comment": "From Web Platform",
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "type_time": mt5.ORDER_TIME_GTC,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "type_filling": mt5.ORDER_FILLING_IOC,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    }
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    result = mt5.order_send(request_dict)
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    return jsonify({
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "success": result.retcode == 10009,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "order_id": result.order if result.retcode == 10009 else None,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "message": result.comment,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        "retcode": result.retcode
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    })
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:@app.route('/get_positions', methods=['GET'])
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:def get_positions():
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    if not check_auth():
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        return jsonify({"success": False, "message": "Unauthorized"}), 401
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    positions = mt5.positions_get()
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    if positions is None:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        return jsonify([])
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    result = []
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:    for p in positions:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:        result.append({
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:            "id": str(p.ticket),
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:            "symbol": p.symbol,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:            "type": "buy" if p.type == 0 else "sell",
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:            "lots": p.volume,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:            "open_price": p.price_open,
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:            "sl": p.sl,

MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:## 5. Configure your Web App
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:1. Go to the **Settings** menu of your AI Studio application.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:2. Set `MT5_BRIDGE_URL` to `http://YOUR_VPS_IP:5000`.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:3. Set `MT5_BRIDGE_SECRET` to the same token you set in `bridge.py`.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:## 6. Security Note
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:- Use a strong, long token for `MT5_BRIDGE_SECRET`.
MT5_BRIDGE_SETUP.md:- Configure your VPS Firewall to only allow incoming traffic on port 5000 from the Web App's IP if possible.

mt5_bridge.py:import MetaTrader5 as mt5

mt5_bridge.py:# Configuration
mt5_bridge.py:# Change this token and use it in your Web Platform Admin settings!
mt5_bridge.py:API_TOKEN = "YOUR_SECURE_TOKEN_HERE"

mt5_bridge.py:app = Flask(__name__)
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:# Setup Logging
mt5_bridge.py:logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:def initialize_mt5():
mt5_bridge.py:    if not mt5.initialize():
mt5_bridge.py:        logging.error(f"MT5 initialization failed, error code: {mt5.last_error()}")
mt5_bridge.py:        return False
mt5_bridge.py:    logging.info("MT5 initialized successfully")
mt5_bridge.py:    return True
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:@app.route('/place_trade', methods=['POST'])
mt5_bridge.py:def place_trade():
mt5_bridge.py:    # Security Check
mt5_bridge.py:    token = request.headers.get('Authorization')
mt5_bridge.py:    if token != f"Bearer {API_TOKEN}":
mt5_bridge.py:        return jsonify({"success": False, "message": "Unauthorized"}), 401
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:    data = request.json
mt5_bridge.py:    symbol = data.get('symbol')
mt5_bridge.py:    order_type = data.get('type')  # "BUY" or "SELL"
mt5_bridge.py:    volume = float(data.get('volume', 0.01))
mt5_bridge.py:    sl = float(data.get('sl', 0))
mt5_bridge.py:    tp = float(data.get('tp', 0))
mt5_bridge.py:    
mt5_bridge.py:    if not symbol:
mt5_bridge.py:        return jsonify({"success": False, "message": "Missing symbol"}), 400
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:    # Get Current Price
mt5_bridge.py:    tick = mt5.symbol_info_tick(symbol)
mt5_bridge.py:    if tick is None:
mt5_bridge.py:        return jsonify({"success": False, "message": f"Failed to get price for {symbol}"}), 400
mt5_bridge.py:        
mt5_bridge.py:    price = tick.ask if order_type == "BUY" else tick.bid
mt5_bridge.py:    mt5_type = mt5.ORDER_TYPE_BUY if order_type == "BUY" else mt5.ORDER_TYPE_SELL
mt5_bridge.py:    
mt5_bridge.py:    # Prepare Request
mt5_bridge.py:    request_dict = {
mt5_bridge.py:        "action": mt5.TRADE_ACTION_DEAL,
mt5_bridge.py:        "symbol": symbol,
mt5_bridge.py:        "volume": volume,
mt5_bridge.py:        "type": mt5_type,
mt5_bridge.py:        "price": price,
mt5_bridge.py:        "sl": sl,
mt5_bridge.py:        "tp": tp,
mt5_bridge.py:        "deviation": 20,
mt5_bridge.py:        "magic": 123456,
mt5_bridge.py:        "comment": "Web Platform Bridge",
mt5_bridge.py:        "type_time": mt5.ORDER_TIME_GTC,
mt5_bridge.py:        "type_filling": mt5.ORDER_FILLING_IOC,
mt5_bridge.py:    }
mt5_bridge.py:    
mt5_bridge.py:    # Send Order
mt5_bridge.py:    result = mt5.order_send(request_dict)
mt5_bridge.py:    
mt5_bridge.py:    if result.retcode != mt5.TRADE_RETCODE_DONE:
mt5_bridge.py:        logging.error(f"Order failed: {result.comment} (code: {result.retcode})")
mt5_bridge.py:        return jsonify({
mt5_bridge.py:            "success": False, 
mt5_bridge.py:            "message": result.comment,
mt5_bridge.py:            "code": result.retcode
mt5_bridge.py:        }), 400
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:    logging.info(f"Order successful for {symbol}: Trade ID {result.order}")
mt5_bridge.py:    return jsonify({
mt5_bridge.py:        "success": True,
mt5_bridge.py:        "order_id": result.order,
mt5_bridge.py:        "message": "Order placed successfully"
mt5_bridge.py:    })
mt5_bridge.py:
mt5_bridge.py:@app.route('/health', methods=['GET'])
mt5_bridge.py:def health():
mt5_bridge.py:    return jsonify({"status": "running", "mt5_connected": True})
mt5_bridge.py:

mt5_bridge.py:    if initialize_mt5():
mt5_bridge.py:        print("-" * 50)
mt5_bridge.py:        print("MT5 BRIDGE IS RUNNING")
mt5_bridge.py:        print(f"API Token: {API_TOKEN}")
mt5_bridge.py:        print("Listening on http://0.0.0.0:5000")

mt5_bridge.py:    else:
mt5_bridge.py:        print("Could not start MT5 bridge. Make sure MT5 terminal is open.")
security_spec.md:# Security Specification: Prop Firm Dashboard
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:## 1. Data Invariants
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:1.  **User Ownership**: A user document at `/users/{userId}` can only be created by the user with the matching UID.
security_spec.md:2.  **Notification Privacy**: Notifications at `/users/{userId}/notifications/{notifId}` are only readable by the owner or staff.
security_spec.md:3.  **Trading Integrity**: Trading accounts at `/users/{userId}/tradingAccounts/{acctId}` can only be created by the owner or staff. Balance/equity updates are restricted to staff (to prevent self-funding).
security_spec.md:4.  **Financial Immutability**: Transactions at `/transactions/{txId}` are immutable once completed. They can only be created by verified users for their own UID.
security_spec.md:5.  **Audit Integrity**: Audit logs at `/auditLogs/{logId}` are create-only for staff and immutable.
security_spec.md:6.  **Staff Privilege**: Only users with the `admin` or `moderator` role (verified via `/users/{userId}`) or those in the `/admins` collection can perform administrative actions.
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:## 2. The "Dirty Dozen" Payloads
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 1: Identity Spoofing (Create user with different ID)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/attacker_id`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "id": "attacker_id", "name": "Fake Name", "email": "victim@example.com", "role": "trader", "createdAt": 123456789 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "differnt_uid" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED`
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 2: Privilege Escalation (Self-assign Admin role)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/user_id`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "id": "user_id", "name": "User", "email": "user@example.com", "role": "admin", "createdAt": 123456789 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "user_id" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED` (during creation or update if role is changed)
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 3: Orphaned Data (Create Trading Account for non-existent user)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/non_existent/tradingAccounts/acc_1`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "id": "acc_1", "userId": "non_existent", "accountNumber": "12345", "status": "active", "balance": 100000, "createdAt": 123456789 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "some_uid" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED`
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 4: State Shortcutting (Update Transaction to Completed)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/transactions/tx_1`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "status": "completed" }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "user_id" }` (owner but not admin)
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED`
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 5: Resource Poisoning (Large string in notification)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/user_id/notifications/notif_1`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "id": "notif_1", "userId": "user_id", "message": "A".repeat(10000), "read": false, "createdAt": 123456789 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "user_id" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED` (size limit)
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 6: Shadow Update (Inject ghost field)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/user_id`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "isVerified": true }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "user_id" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED` (hasOnly check)
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 7: Email Spoofing (Unverified admin email)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/packages/pkg_1` (delete)
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `null`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "admin_uid", "token": { "email": "admin@prop.com", "email_verified": false } }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED`
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 8: PII Blanket Read (Scan all verification requests)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/verificationRequests` (list)
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `null`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "trader_uid" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED` (must filter by userId)
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 9: Cross-User Notification Update
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/victim_id/notifications/notif_1`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "read": true }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "attacker_id" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED`
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 10: Bot Profile Manipulation
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/botProfiles/aggressive`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "buyProbability": 1.0 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "some_uid" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED` (Admin only)
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 11: Immutable Field Update (Change createdAt)
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/users/user_id`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "createdAt": 999999999 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "user_id" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED`
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:### Payload 12: Invalid Symbol Config
security_spec.md:- **Path**: `/symbolConfigs/BTCUSD`
security_spec.md:- **Data**: `{ "leverage": 1000 }`
security_spec.md:- **Auth**: `{ "uid": "user_id" }`
security_spec.md:- **Expected**: `PERMISSION_DENIED` (Admin only)
public/README.md:# Public Assets Directory
public/README.md:
public/README.md:Please upload your transparent logo image here and name it `logo.png`.
public/README.md:
public/README.md:### How to upload:
public/README.md:1. In the file explorer on the left of Google AI Studio, locate or create the **public** folder.
public/README.md:2. Select or drag-and-drop your image into this folder.
public/README.md:3. Rename the uploaded image to `logo.png`.
public/README.md:
public/README.md:The application's `<Logo />` component is configured to automatically load `/logo.png` from this directory. If it's missing or hasn't been uploaded yet, it will dynamically fall back to the high-fidelity SVG/CSS metallic styled logo.

server.ts:// Bot Cache State to prevent Firestore Quota hits
server.ts:let cachedBots: any[] | null = null;
server.ts:let botCacheTime = 0;
server.ts:let cachedBotProfiles: Map<string, any> | null = null;
server.ts:let botProfilesCacheTime = 0;

server.ts:async function getCachedBots() {
server.ts:  const now = Date.now();
server.ts:  if (cachedBots && (now - botCacheTime < 1800000)) { // 30 minutes cache
server.ts:    return cachedBots;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const botSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users').where('isBot', '==', true).get();
server.ts:    const bots = botSnap.docs
server.ts:      .map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() }))
server.ts:      .filter((b: any) => b.isActive !== false && b.status !== 'inactive');
server.ts:    cachedBots = bots;
server.ts:    botCacheTime = now;
server.ts:    console.log(`Bot Engine Cache: Cached ${bots.length} active bots from Firestore.`);
server.ts:    return bots;
server.ts:  } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:    const errText = String(e?.message || e);
server.ts:    if (errText.includes('RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED') || errText.includes('Quota') || errText.includes('quota') || errText.includes('limit exceeded')) {
server.ts:      console.warn("Bot Engine Cache Note: Firestore Quota exhausted while fetching bots. Using cache/local fallback.");
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      console.error("Bot Engine Cache: Failed to fetch bots:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (!cachedBots || cachedBots.length === 0) {
server.ts:      cachedBots = [
server.ts:        { id: "bot-1", isBot: true, name: "Ionut F.", email: "ionut@profit.com", country: "RO", alias: "Alpha Trader" },
server.ts:        { id: "bot-2", isBot: true, name: "Maria G.", email: "maria@profit.com", country: "RO", alias: "Golden Eagle" },
server.ts:        { id: "bot-3", isBot: true, name: "Stanimir P.", email: "stanimir@profit.com", country: "BG", alias: "Balkan Bull" }
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return cachedBots;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function getCachedBotProfiles() {
server.ts:  const now = Date.now();
server.ts:  if (cachedBotProfiles && (now - botProfilesCacheTime < 3600000)) { // 1 hour cache
server.ts:    return cachedBotProfiles;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const profilesSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('botProfiles').get();
server.ts:    const profilesMap = new Map();
server.ts:    profilesSnap.forEach(d => profilesMap.set(d.id, d.data()));
server.ts:    cachedBotProfiles = profilesMap;
server.ts:    botProfilesCacheTime = now;
server.ts:    console.log(`Bot Engine Cache: Cached bot profiles.`);
server.ts:    return profilesMap;
server.ts:  } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:    const errText = String(e?.message || e);
server.ts:    if (errText.includes('RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED') || errText.includes('Quota') || errText.includes('quota') || errText.includes('limit exceeded')) {
server.ts:      console.warn("Bot Engine Cache Note: Firestore Quota exhausted while fetching bot profiles. Using cache/local fallback.");
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      console.error("Bot Engine Cache: Failed to fetch profiles:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (!cachedBotProfiles || cachedBotProfiles.size === 0) {
server.ts:      cachedBotProfiles = new Map();
server.ts:      cachedBotProfiles.set("conservative", { name: "Conservative", winRate: 55, dailyRisk: 1 });
server.ts:      cachedBotProfiles.set("aggressive", { name: "Aggressive", winRate: 62, dailyRisk: 3 });
server.ts:      cachedBotProfiles.set("scalper", { name: "Scalper", winRate: 70, dailyRisk: 2 });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return cachedBotProfiles;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function getCachedActiveCompetitions() {
server.ts:  const now = Date.now();
server.ts:  if (cachedCompetitionsList && (now - competitionsListCacheTime < 300000)) { // 5 minutes cache
server.ts:    return cachedCompetitionsList;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const compListSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('system').doc('competitionsList').get();
server.ts:    if (compListSnap.exists && compListSnap.data()?.list) {
server.ts:      const list = compListSnap.data()!.list || [];
server.ts:      const active = list.filter((c: any) => c.isActive && c.botsEnabled);
server.ts:      cachedCompetitionsList = active;
server.ts:      competitionsListCacheTime = now;
server.ts:      return active;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return [];
server.ts:  } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:    const errText = String(e?.message || e);
server.ts:    if (errText.includes('RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED') || errText.includes('Quota') || errText.includes('quota') || errText.includes('limit exceeded')) {
server.ts:      console.warn("Bot Engine Cache Note: Firestore Quota exhausted while fetching competitions. Using cache/local fallback.");
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      console.error("Bot Engine Cache: Failed to fetch competitions:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    if (!cachedCompetitionsList || cachedCompetitionsList.length === 0) {
server.ts:      cachedCompetitionsList = [
server.ts:        { id: "monthly-default", isActive: true, botsEnabled: true, currentMonthName: "Competition Month" }
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return cachedCompetitionsList;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Bot Engine Logic
server.ts:async function runBotEngine() {
server.ts:  if (!dbAdmin) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    // 1. Get active competitions with bots enabled (cached!)
server.ts:    const activeComps = await getCachedActiveCompetitions();
server.ts:    if (activeComps.length === 0) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Prefetch all bots (cached!)
server.ts:    const botsList = await getCachedBots();
server.ts:    if (botsList.length === 0) return;
server.ts:
server.ts:    for (const comp of activeComps) {
server.ts:      const compId = comp.id;
server.ts:      console.log(`Bot Engine: Processing competition ${compId}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:      // 2. Fetch all trading accounts for this competition in one batch
server.ts:      const enrolledBotAccountsSnap = await dbAdmin.collectionGroup('tradingAccounts')
server.ts:        .where('competitionId', '==', compId)
server.ts:        .where('type', '==', 'competition')
server.ts:        .get();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const enrolledDocs = enrolledBotAccountsSnap.docs;
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Ensure bots are enrolled using the list we just fetched!
server.ts:      await enrollBotsInCompetitionOptimized(compId, enrolledDocs, botsList);
server.ts:
server.ts:      // 3. Handle bot trading activity (pass pre-fetched accounts and bots list!)
server.ts:      await processBotTradingOptimized(compId, comp, enrolledDocs, botsList);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error("Bot Engine Loop Error:", e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function enrollBotsInCompetitionOptimized(compId: string, enrolledDocs: any[], botsList: any[]) {
server.ts:  const enrolledUserIds = new Set(enrolledDocs.map(doc => doc.data().userId));
server.ts:
server.ts:  for (const bot of botsList) {
server.ts:    const botId = bot.id;
server.ts:    if (!enrolledUserIds.has(botId)) {
server.ts:      console.log(`Bot Engine: Enrolling bot ${botId} in competition ${compId}`);
server.ts:      const accId = `bot-acc-${botId}-${compId}`;
server.ts:      await dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(botId)
server.ts:        .collection('tradingAccounts').doc(accId).set({
server.ts:          id: accId,
server.ts:          userId: botId,
server.ts:          accountNumber: `BOT-${Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000)}`,
server.ts:          status: 'active',
server.ts:          balance: 100000,
server.ts:          initialBalance: 100000,
server.ts:          type: 'competition',
server.ts:          competitionId: compId,
server.ts:          createdAt: Date.now()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      console.log(`Bot ${botId} enrolled in competition ${compId}`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function processBotTradingOptimized(compId: string, comp: any, enrolledDocs: any[], botsList: any[]) {
server.ts:  const db = getDb();
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Create bot lookup map for fast in-memory checks
server.ts:  const botMap = new Map();
server.ts:  botsList.forEach(b => botMap.set(b.id, b));
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Only keep enrolled accounts that belong to known bots
server.ts:  const enrolledBotDocs = enrolledDocs.filter(doc => botMap.has(doc.data().userId));
server.ts:  console.log(`Bot Engine: Processing trading for ${enrolledBotDocs.length} enrolled bots in ${compId}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Fetch bot profiles once, or look up cached map
server.ts:  const profilesMap = await getCachedBotProfiles();
server.ts:
server.ts:  // 1 query for all open positions in competition instead of N queries!
server.ts:  const openPositionsByBot = new Map<string, any[]>();
server.ts:  if (!db && dbAdmin) {
server.ts:    const openPositionsSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('bot_positions')
server.ts:      .where('competitionId', '==', compId)
server.ts:      .where('status', '==', 'open')
server.ts:      .get();
server.ts:      
server.ts:    openPositionsSnap.docs.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:      const pos = doc.data();
server.ts:      const botId = pos.userId;
server.ts:      if (botId) {
server.ts:        if (!openPositionsByBot.has(botId)) {
server.ts:          openPositionsByBot.set(botId, []);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        openPositionsByBot.get(botId)!.push({ ref: doc.ref, id: doc.id, ...pos });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Optimized single batch query for all positions opened in the last 24 hours in this competition
server.ts:  const tradesLast24hByBot = new Map<string, number>();
server.ts:  if (!db && dbAdmin) {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const oneDayAgo = Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
server.ts:      const positionsLast24hSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('bot_positions')
server.ts:        .where('competitionId', '==', compId)
server.ts:        .where('openTime', '>=', oneDayAgo)
server.ts:        .get();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      positionsLast24hSnap.docs.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:        const p = doc.data();
server.ts:        const bId = p.userId;
server.ts:        if (bId) {
server.ts:          tradesLast24hByBot.set(bId, (tradesLast24hByBot.get(bId) || 0) + 1);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      console.log(`Bot Engine: Cached 24h trade statistics for competition ${compId}. Found ${positionsLast24hSnap.size} trades.`);
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error fetching last 24h positions in Bot Engine:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } else if (db) {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const res = await db.query(
server.ts:        "SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as count FROM sql_positions WHERE competition_id = $1 AND open_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY user_id",
server.ts:        [compId]
server.ts:      );
server.ts:      res.rows.forEach(r => {
server.ts:        tradesLast24hByBot.set(r.user_id, parseInt(r.count));
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error fetching last 24h positions in SQL:", e);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  for (const doc of enrolledBotDocs) {
server.ts:    const acc = doc.data();
server.ts:    const botId = acc.userId;
server.ts:    if (!botId) continue;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const bot = botMap.get(botId);
server.ts:    if (!bot) continue;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const profileId = bot.botProfile || 'balanced';
server.ts:    const profile = profilesMap.get(profileId);
server.ts:    if (!profile) continue;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // A. Check for expiring trades
server.ts:    if (db) {
server.ts:      await closeExpiredBotTrades(db, botId, compId);
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      const botSpecificOpenPositionsDocuments = openPositionsByBot.get(botId) || [];
server.ts:      await closeExpiredBotTradesOptimizedFirestore(botId, compId, botSpecificOpenPositionsDocuments);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // B. Check open count
server.ts:    let openCount = 0;
server.ts:    if (db) {
server.ts:      const posResult = await db.query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sql_positions WHERE user_id = $1 AND status = 'open'", [botId]);
server.ts:      openCount = parseInt(posResult.rows[0].count);
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      openCount = (openPositionsByBot.get(botId) || []).length;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // C. Calculate deterministic daily limit (1, 2, or 3) based on botId hash
server.ts:    // This distributes the limits beautifully without requiring persistent fields
server.ts:    let hash = 0;
server.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < botId.length; i++) {
server.ts:      hash += botId.charCodeAt(i);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const dailyLimit = (hash % 3) + 1; // 1, 2, or 3 trades max per 24 hours
server.ts:
server.ts:    // D. Evaluate trade opportunity
server.ts:    const tradesToday = tradesLast24hByBot.get(botId) || 0;
server.ts:    if (tradesToday < dailyLimit) {
server.ts:      // With a 2-hour loop interval (12 opportunities per 24h), a 25% chance of trading
server.ts:      // in any tick perfectly staggers and randomizes when they execute.
server.ts:      const staggerChance = 0.25;
server.ts:      if (Math.random() < staggerChance) {
server.ts:        const maxPositions = profile.riskLevel === 'aggressive' ? 5 : 2;
server.ts:        if (openCount < maxPositions) {
server.ts:          await openBotTrade(db, botId, profile, compId);
server.ts:          // Increment in-memory counter to prevent double-opening in the same tick run
server.ts:          tradesLast24hByBot.set(botId, tradesToday + 1);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      console.log(`Bot Engine: Bot ${botId} reached daily limit of ${dailyLimit} trades today (has ${tradesToday}). Skipping.`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:
server.ts:async function openBotTrade(db: pg.Pool | null, botId: string, profile: any, compId: string) {
server.ts:  const symbol = profile.preferredInstruments[Math.floor(Math.random() * profile.preferredInstruments.length)];
server.ts:  const type = Math.random() < (profile.buyProbability || 0.5) ? 'buy' : 'sell';
server.ts:  const lots = (Math.random() * (profile.lotSizeRange[1] - profile.lotSizeRange[0]) + profile.lotSizeRange[0]).toFixed(2);
server.ts:  const duration = Math.floor(Math.random() * (profile.maxDuration - profile.minDuration) + profile.minDuration);
server.ts:  
server.ts:  const baselinePrices: Record<string, number> = {
server.ts:    'EURUSD': 1.0850,
server.ts:    'GBPUSD': 1.2650,
server.ts:    'USDJPY': 150.20,
server.ts:    'XAUUSD': 2024.50,
server.ts:    'US30': 38500.0,
server.ts:    'NAS100': 17800.0,
server.ts:    'BTCUSD': 62000.0,
server.ts:    'ETHUSD': 3400.0
server.ts:  };
server.ts:  
server.ts:  const baseOpen = baselinePrices[symbol] || 100.0;
server.ts:  // Slight random offset from baseline
server.ts:  const openPriceRaw = baseOpen * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.002 - 0.001));
server.ts:  const prec = symbol.includes("JPY") ? 3 : (symbol.includes("BTC") || symbol.includes("XAU") || symbol.includes("US30") || symbol.includes("NAS100") || symbol.includes("ETH")) ? 2 : 5;
server.ts:  const openPrice = parseFloat(openPriceRaw.toFixed(prec));
server.ts:  const closeAt = Date.now() + duration * 60000;
server.ts:
server.ts:  if (db) {
server.ts:    await db.query(
server.ts:      "INSERT INTO sql_positions (user_id, symbol, lots, open_price, type, status, open_time, details, competition_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'open', NOW(), $6, $7)",
server.ts:      [botId, symbol, lots, openPrice, type, JSON.stringify({ closeAt, isBot: true }), compId]
server.ts:    );
server.ts:  } else if (dbAdmin) {
server.ts:    await dbAdmin.collection('bot_positions').add({
server.ts:      userId: botId,
server.ts:      symbol,
server.ts:      lots,
server.ts:      openPrice,
server.ts:      type,
server.ts:      status: 'open',
server.ts:      openTime: Date.now(),
server.ts:      closeAt,
server.ts:      competitionId: compId
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  console.log(`Bot ${botId} opened ${type} ${lots} ${symbol} for comp ${compId}`);
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function closeExpiredBotTrades(db: pg.Pool | null, botId: string, compId: string) {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    if (db) {
server.ts:      const openTrades = await db.query("SELECT * FROM sql_positions WHERE user_id = $1 AND status = 'open'", [botId]);
server.ts:      for (const trade of openTrades.rows) {
server.ts:        if (!trade.details) continue;
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          const details = JSON.parse(trade.details);
server.ts:          if (details.closeAt && Date.now() > details.closeAt) {
server.ts:            const pnlPerLot = (Math.random() * 500) - 200; 
server.ts:            const pnl = Math.round(pnlPerLot * parseFloat(trade.lots) * 100) / 100;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const priceDiffRaw = (pnl / parseFloat(trade.lots)) / 100000; 
server.ts:            const priceDiff = trade.type === 'buy' ? priceDiffRaw : -priceDiffRaw;
server.ts:            const closePriceRaw = parseFloat(trade.open_price) + priceDiff;
server.ts:            const prec = trade.symbol.includes("JPY") ? 3 : (trade.symbol.includes("BTC") || trade.symbol.includes("XAU") || trade.symbol.includes("US30") || trade.symbol.includes("NAS100") || trade.symbol.includes("ETH")) ? 2 : 5;
server.ts:            const closePrice = parseFloat(closePriceRaw.toFixed(prec));
server.ts:
server.ts:            await db.query(
server.ts:              "UPDATE sql_positions SET status = 'closed', close_price = $1, close_time = NOW(), pnl = $2 WHERE id = $3",
server.ts:              [closePrice, pnl, trade.id]
server.ts:            );
server.ts:            console.log(`Bot ${botId} closed trade ${trade.id} PnL: ${pnl.toFixed(2)}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (trade.competition_id && dbAdmin) {
server.ts:               const accId = `bot-acc-${botId}-${trade.competition_id}`;
server.ts:               const accRef = dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(botId).collection('tradingAccounts').doc(accId);
server.ts:               const accSnap = await accRef.get();
server.ts:               if (accSnap.exists) {
server.ts:                 const acc = accSnap.data();
server.ts:                 const newBalance = Math.round(((acc.balance || 0) + pnl) * 100) / 100;
server.ts:                 const history = acc.history || [];
server.ts:                 history.push({
server.ts:                   symbol: trade.symbol,
server.ts:                   type: trade.type,
server.ts:                   lots: trade.lots,
server.ts:                   open_price: trade.open_price,
server.ts:                   close_price: closePrice,
server.ts:                   profit: Math.round(pnl * 100) / 100
server.ts:                 });
server.ts:                 if (history.length > 50) history.shift();
server.ts:                 
server.ts:                 await accRef.update({ balance: newBalance, equity: newBalance, history });
server.ts:               }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:          // ignore
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } else if (dbAdmin) {
server.ts:      const openTradesSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('bot_positions')
server.ts:        .where('userId', '==', botId)
server.ts:        .where('competitionId', '==', compId)
server.ts:        .where('status', '==', 'open')
server.ts:        .get();
server.ts:        
server.ts:      for (const doc of openTradesSnap.docs) {
server.ts:        const trade = doc.data();
server.ts:        if (trade.closeAt && Date.now() > trade.closeAt) {
server.ts:          const pnlPerLot = (Math.random() * 500) - 200; 
server.ts:          const pnl = Math.round(pnlPerLot * parseFloat(trade.lots) * 100) / 100;
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const priceDiffRaw = (pnl / parseFloat(trade.lots)) / 100000; 
server.ts:          const priceDiff = trade.type === 'buy' ? priceDiffRaw : -priceDiffRaw;
server.ts:          const closePriceRaw = parseFloat(trade.openPrice) + priceDiff;
server.ts:          const prec = trade.symbol.includes("JPY") ? 3 : (trade.symbol.includes("BTC") || trade.symbol.includes("XAU") || trade.symbol.includes("US30") || trade.symbol.includes("NAS100") || trade.symbol.includes("ETH")) ? 2 : 5;
server.ts:          const closePrice = parseFloat(closePriceRaw.toFixed(prec));
server.ts:
server.ts:          await doc.ref.update({
server.ts:            status: 'closed',
server.ts:            closePrice: closePrice,
server.ts:            closeTime: Date.now(),
server.ts:            pnl: pnl
server.ts:          });
server.ts:          console.log(`Bot ${botId} closed Firestore trade ${doc.id} PnL: ${pnl.toFixed(2)}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:          const accId = `bot-acc-${botId}-${compId}`;
server.ts:          const accRef = dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(botId).collection('tradingAccounts').doc(accId);
server.ts:          const accSnap = await accRef.get();
server.ts:          if (accSnap.exists) {
server.ts:            const acc = accSnap.data();
server.ts:            const newBalance = Math.round(((acc.balance || 0) + pnl) * 100) / 100;
server.ts:            const history = acc.history || [];
server.ts:            history.push({
server.ts:              symbol: trade.symbol,
server.ts:              type: trade.type,
server.ts:              lots: trade.lots,
server.ts:              open_price: trade.openPrice,
server.ts:              close_price: closePrice,
server.ts:              profit: Math.round(pnl * 100) / 100
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            if (history.length > 50) history.shift();
server.ts:            
server.ts:            await accRef.update({ balance: newBalance, equity: newBalance, history });
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    // ignore
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function closeExpiredBotTradesOptimizedFirestore(botId: string, compId: string, openDocs: any[]) {
server.ts:  if (!dbAdmin) return;
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    for (const trade of openDocs) {
server.ts:      if (trade.closeAt && Date.now() > trade.closeAt) {
server.ts:        const pnlPerLot = (Math.random() * 500) - 200; 
server.ts:        const pnl = Math.round(pnlPerLot * parseFloat(trade.lots) * 100) / 100;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const priceDiffRaw = (pnl / parseFloat(trade.lots)) / 100000; 
server.ts:        const priceDiff = trade.type === 'buy' ? priceDiffRaw : -priceDiffRaw;
server.ts:        const closePriceRaw = parseFloat(trade.openPrice) + priceDiff;
server.ts:        const prec = trade.symbol.includes("JPY") ? 3 : (trade.symbol.includes("BTC") || trade.symbol.includes("XAU") || trade.symbol.includes("US30") || trade.symbol.includes("NAS100") || trade.symbol.includes("ETH")) ? 2 : 5;
server.ts:        const closePrice = parseFloat(closePriceRaw.toFixed(prec));
server.ts:
server.ts:        await trade.ref.update({
server.ts:          status: 'closed',
server.ts:          closePrice: closePrice,
server.ts:          closeTime: Date.now(),
server.ts:          pnl: pnl
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        console.log(`Bot ${botId} closed Firestore trade ${trade.id} PnL: ${pnl.toFixed(2)}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:        const accId = `bot-acc-${botId}-${compId}`;
server.ts:        const accRef = dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(botId).collection('tradingAccounts').doc(accId);
server.ts:        const accSnap = await accRef.get();
server.ts:        if (accSnap.exists) {
server.ts:          const acc = accSnap.data();
server.ts:          const newBalance = Math.round(((acc.balance || 0) + pnl) * 100) / 100;
server.ts:          const history = acc.history || [];
server.ts:          history.push({
server.ts:            symbol: trade.symbol,
server.ts:            type: trade.type,
server.ts:            lots: trade.lots,
server.ts:            open_price: trade.openPrice,
server.ts:            close_price: closePrice,
server.ts:            profit: Math.round(pnl * 100) / 100
server.ts:          });
server.ts:          if (history.length > 50) history.shift();
server.ts:          
server.ts:          await accRef.update({ balance: newBalance, equity: newBalance, history });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error in closeExpiredBotTradesOptimizedFirestore:", e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:
server.ts:
server.ts:function getEncryptionKey() {
server.ts:  const key = process.env.JWT_SECRET || process.env.ENCRYPTION_KEY;
server.ts:  if (!key) {
server.ts:    return crypto.createHash('sha256').update('default-dev-key').digest();
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(key).digest();
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:const ENCRYPTION_KEY = getEncryptionKey(); // 32 bytes
server.ts:const IV_LENGTH = 16;
server.ts:
server.ts:function encrypt(text: string) {
server.ts:  const iv = crypto.randomBytes(IV_LENGTH);
server.ts:  const cipher = crypto.createCipheriv('aes-256-cbc', Buffer.from(ENCRYPTION_KEY), iv);
server.ts:  let encrypted = cipher.update(text);
server.ts:  encrypted = Buffer.concat([encrypted, cipher.final()]);
server.ts:  return iv.toString('hex') + ':' + encrypted.toString('hex');
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:function decrypt(text: string) {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const textParts = text.split(':');
server.ts:    if (textParts.length !== 2) return text;
server.ts:    const iv = Buffer.from(textParts.shift()!, 'hex');
server.ts:    const encryptedText = Buffer.from(textParts.join(':'), 'hex');
server.ts:    const decipher = crypto.createDecipheriv('aes-256-cbc', Buffer.from(ENCRYPTION_KEY), iv);
server.ts:    let decrypted = decipher.update(encryptedText);
server.ts:    decrypted = Buffer.concat([decrypted, decipher.final()]);
server.ts:    return decrypted.toString();
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    return text; // probably not encrypted, just return raw
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:const { Pool } = pg;
server.ts:let pool: pg.Pool | null = null;
server.ts:function getDb() {
server.ts:  if (!pool && process.env.DATABASE_URL) {
server.ts:    pool = new Pool({
server.ts:      connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  return pool;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Ensure the tables exist
server.ts:async function initDb() {
server.ts:  const db = getDb();
server.ts:  if (!db) {
server.ts:    console.warn("DATABASE_URL not found. Skipping PostgreSQL initialization.");
server.ts:    return;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    await db.query(`
server.ts:      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sql_transactions (
server.ts:        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
server.ts:        user_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
server.ts:        amount NUMERIC NOT NULL,
server.ts:        type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
server.ts:        status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
server.ts:        date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
server.ts:        payment_method VARCHAR(100),
server.ts:        description TEXT
server.ts:      );
server.ts:
server.ts:      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sql_audit_logs (
server.ts:        id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
server.ts:        action VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
server.ts:        user_id VARCHAR(128),
server.ts:        target_id VARCHAR(128),
server.ts:        target_name VARCHAR(255),
server.ts:        type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
server.ts:        details TEXT,
server.ts:        timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
server.ts:      );
server.ts:
server.ts:      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sql_positions (

server.ts:async function getBrevoConfig() {
server.ts:  // 1. Try Firestore config first (allows updating via Admin Panel)
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const docRef = dbAdmin.collection('apis').doc('api-brevo');
server.ts:    const docSnap = await docRef.get();
server.ts:    if (docSnap.exists) {
server.ts:      const config = docSnap.data()?.config;
server.ts:      if (config?.SecretKey) {
server.ts:        return {
server.ts:          apiKey: decrypt(config.SecretKey),
server.ts:          senderEmail: config.SenderEmail || "no-reply@fundedgoo.com",
server.ts:          senderName: config.SenderName || "FundedGoo"
server.ts:        };
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error("Failed to fetch Brevo config from Firestore:", e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // 2. Fallback to Env Vars
server.ts:  if (process.env.BREVO_API_KEY) {
server.ts:    return {
server.ts:      apiKey: process.env.BREVO_API_KEY,
server.ts:      senderEmail: process.env.BREVO_SENDER_EMAIL || "no-reply@fundedgoo.com",
server.ts:      senderName: process.env.BREVO_SENDER_NAME || "FundedGoo"
server.ts:    };
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  
server.ts:  return null;
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function sendVerificationEmail(email: string, token: string) {
server.ts:  const brevo = await getBrevoConfig();
server.ts:  if (!brevo) {
server.ts:    console.warn("Brevo API not configured in Admin. Skipping verification email.");
server.ts:    return;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  const verifyUrl = `${process.env.APP_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'}/api/auth/verify-email?token=${token}`;
server.ts:
server.ts:  const htmlContent = `
server.ts:    <div style="font-family: sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; background-color: #0f172a; color: white; border-radius: 12px;">
server.ts:      <h1 style="color: #f97316;">Salut!</h1>
server.ts:      <p>Îți mulțumim că te-ai alăturat FundedGoo. Te rugăm să îți confirmi adresa de email apăsând pe butonul de mai jos:</p>
server.ts:      <div style="text-align: center; margin: 30px 0;">
server.ts:        <a href="${verifyUrl}" style="background-color: #f97316; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: bold;">Confirmă Email</a>
server.ts:      </div>
server.ts:      <p style="font-size: 14px; color: #94a3b8;">Dacă nu ai creat tu acest cont, poți ignora acest email.</p>
server.ts:    </div>
server.ts:  `;
server.ts:
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const response = await fetch('https://api.brevo.com/v3/smtp/email', {
server.ts:      method: 'POST',
server.ts:      headers: {
server.ts:        'Accept': 'application/json',
server.ts:        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
server.ts:        'api-key': brevo.apiKey
server.ts:      },

server.ts:        sender: {
server.ts:          name: brevo.senderName,
server.ts:          email: brevo.senderEmail
server.ts:        },
server.ts:        to: [{ email }],
server.ts:        subject: "Confirmare Cont FundedGoo",
server.ts:        htmlContent
server.ts:      })
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (!response.ok) {
server.ts:      const errData = await response.json();
server.ts:      console.error("Brevo API Error:", errData);
server.ts:      throw new Error("Failed to send email via Brevo.");
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    console.log(`Verification email sent successfully to ${email}`);
server.ts:  } catch (error) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error sending verification email:", error);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function getStripe(): Promise<Stripe> {
server.ts:  // 1. Try Firestore config first (allows updating via Admin Panel)
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const docRef = dbAdmin.collection('apis').doc('api-stripe');
server.ts:    const docSnap = await docRef.get();
server.ts:    if (docSnap.exists) {
server.ts:      const config = docSnap.data()?.config;
server.ts:      if (config?.SecretKey) {
server.ts:        console.log("Using Stripe key from Firestore.");
server.ts:        const decryptedKey = decrypt(config.SecretKey);
server.ts:        return new Stripe(decryptedKey, {});
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    console.log("No config found in Firestore for api-stripe, falling back to ENV.");
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error("Failed to fetch Stripe key from Firestore:", e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // 2. Fallback to Env Vars
server.ts:  const envKey = process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY;
server.ts:  if (envKey && envKey.startsWith('sk_')) {
server.ts:    console.log("Using Stripe key from Environment Variable.");
server.ts:    return new Stripe(envKey, {});
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  throw new Error(
server.ts:    "STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is missing. Please configure it in the Admin Panel or Settings menu.",
server.ts:  );
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// ==========================================
server.ts:// DUKASCOPY-NODE: LIVE FEED STATE
server.ts:// ==========================================
server.ts:const mapSymbolToDukascopy = (uiSymbol: string): any => {
server.ts:  const sym = uiSymbol.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g, "");
server.ts:  if (sym === "NAS100") return "usatechidxusd";
server.ts:  if (sym === "US30") return "usa30idxusd";
server.ts:  if (sym === "US500") return "usa500idxusd";
server.ts:  if (sym === "GER40") return "deuidxeur";
server.ts:  if (sym === "UK100") return "gbridxgbp";
server.ts:  if (sym === "JPN225") return "jpnidxjpy";
server.ts:  if (sym === "USOIL" || sym === "WTI") return "lightcmdusd";
server.ts:  if (sym === "UKOIL" || sym === "BRENT") return "brentcmdusd";
server.ts:  return sym.toLowerCase();
server.ts:};
server.ts:
server.ts:const liveRatesMap: Record<string, any> = {};
server.ts:const activeInstruments = new Set<string>(["EUR/USD", "GBP/USD", "USD/JPY", "AUD/USD", "USD/CHF", "USD/CAD", "XAU/USD", "XAG/USD", "NAS100", "US30"]);
server.ts:
server.ts:async function startLiveFeed(io: SocketIOServer) {
server.ts:  console.log("[Dukascopy] Starting high-frequency live feed mechanism (max 250ms lag)...");
server.ts:  
server.ts:  const poll = async () => {
server.ts:    let updated = false;
server.ts:
server.ts:    await Promise.all(
server.ts:      Array.from(activeInstruments).map(async (inst) => {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          const dukSym = mapSymbolToDukascopy(inst);
server.ts:          const ticks = await getRealTimeRates({
server.ts:            instrument: dukSym,
server.ts:            timeframe: "tick",
server.ts:            format: "json",
server.ts:            last: 1
server.ts:          });
server.ts:          
server.ts:          if (ticks && ticks.length > 0) {
server.ts:            const t: any = ticks[0];
server.ts:            // Only update if timestamp advanced
server.ts:            if (liveRatesMap[inst] && liveRatesMap[inst][0] === t.timestamp) return;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            liveRatesMap[inst] = [
server.ts:              t.timestamp, 
server.ts:              t.bidPrice, 
server.ts:              t.askPrice
server.ts:            ];
server.ts:            updated = true;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:           // Silently catch to avoid polluting logs on connection drops
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      })
server.ts:    );
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (updated) {
server.ts:      io.emit("quotes", liveRatesMap);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Rerun immediately after waiting 250ms (achieving max 250ms lag)
server.ts:    setTimeout(poll, 250);
server.ts:  };
server.ts:  
server.ts:  // Start the loop
server.ts:  poll();
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function startServer() {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    await initFirebase();
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error("CRITICAL: Firebase initialization failed during startup:", e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  const app = express();
server.ts:  const PORT = 3000;
server.ts:
server.ts:  const httpServer = http.createServer(app);
server.ts:  const io = new SocketIOServer(httpServer, {
server.ts:    cors: { origin: "*" },
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  io.on("connection", (socket) => {
server.ts:    console.log("Client connected to WebSockets");
server.ts:    socket.on("subscribe_instrument", (sym) => {
server.ts:      if (typeof sym === "string" && sym.trim()) {
server.ts:        activeInstruments.add(sym.trim());
server.ts:        socket.emit("quotes", liveRatesMap); // Give immediately current value
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.use(express.json());
server.ts:
server.ts:  // API Routes
server.ts:  const authenticate = async (req: any, res: any, next: any) => {
server.ts:    const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
server.ts:    if (!authHeader) {
server.ts:      console.error("Auth Error: Missing Authorization header");
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized: Missing token' });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (!authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
server.ts:      console.error("Auth Error: Malformed Authorization header - missing 'Bearer ' prefix");
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized: Malformed header' });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
server.ts:    if (!token || token === "" || token === "undefined" || token === "null") {
server.ts:      console.error("Auth Error: Malformed Authorization header - token is empty or invalid string");
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized: Invalid token format' });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      if (!firebaseAdminApp) {
server.ts:        console.error("Auth Error: firebaseAdminApp is not initialized");
server.ts:        return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal Error: Firebase not ready' });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const decodedToken = await firebaseAdminApp.auth().verifyIdToken(token);
server.ts:      req.user = decodedToken;
server.ts:      next();
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Auth Error: verifyIdToken failed. Code:", error?.code, "Message:", error?.message);
server.ts:      if (error && error.message && error.message.includes("aud")) {
server.ts:        console.error("Audience Mismatch detected. Token Project:", error.message.split('got "')[1]?.split('"')[0]);
server.ts:        console.error("Server expected Project:", firebaseAdminApp.options.projectId);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized: Invalid token', details: error?.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  };
server.ts:
server.ts:  const isAdminMiddleware = async (req: any, res: any, next: any) => {
server.ts:    if (!req.user) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized' });
server.ts:    const isSuperAdmin = 
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'websiteanglia@gmail.com' || 
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'admin@prop.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'florinelvictorlupascu@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'fundedgoo@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'cloudcomun@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.uid === '92Lluf6ztBasw1COuRRXHteVJfr1' ||
server.ts:      req.user.uid === 'XyFVhiDlrNVP5WIpaA56mGq5wUI3';
server.ts:      
server.ts:    if (isSuperAdmin) {
server.ts:      next();
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const userSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:        if (userSnap.exists && userSnap.data()?.role === 'admin') {
server.ts:           return next();
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        const adminSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('admins').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:        if (adminSnap.exists) {
server.ts:          next();
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          res.status(403).json({ error: 'Forbidden: Admin access required' });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:        console.error("Firebase Admin Error:", err);
server.ts:        res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal Server Error' });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  };
server.ts:
server.ts:  const isStaffMiddleware = async (req: any, res: any, next: any) => {
server.ts:    if (!req.user) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized' });
server.ts:    const isSuperAdmin = 
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'websiteanglia@gmail.com' || 
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'admin@prop.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'florinelvictorlupascu@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'fundedgoo@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.email === 'cloudcomun@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:      req.user.uid === '92Lluf6ztBasw1COuRRXHteVJfr1' ||
server.ts:      req.user.uid === 'XyFVhiDlrNVP5WIpaA56mGq5wUI3';
server.ts:      
server.ts:    if (isSuperAdmin) {
server.ts:      return next();
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const userSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:      if (userSnap.exists && (userSnap.data()?.role === 'admin' || userSnap.data()?.role === 'moderator')) {
server.ts:        return next();
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const adminSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('admins').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:      if (adminSnap.exists) {
server.ts:        next();
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        res.status(403).json({ error: 'Forbidden: Staff access required' });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Firebase Admin Error:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal Server Error' });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  };
