server.ts:  app.post("/api/order", authenticate, async (req: any, res: any) => {
server.ts:    const { user_id, tradingAccountId, symbol, lots, type, fillPrice, sl, tp } = req.body;
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Security: Ensure user only places orders for themselves
server.ts:    if (user_id !== req.user.uid) {
server.ts:      return res.status(403).json({ error: "Forbidden: Cannot place order for another user" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // We trust the frontend's explicit fillPrice to maintain sync with the client's realtime price
server.ts:    const finalFillPrice = parseFloat(fillPrice);
server.ts:    if (isNaN(finalFillPrice)) {
server.ts:      return res
server.ts:        .status(400)
server.ts:        .json({ error: "fillPrice is required and must be a valid number" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const db = getDb();
server.ts:    if (db) {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        await db.query(
server.ts:          "INSERT INTO sql_positions (user_id, symbol, lots, open_price, type, sl, tp) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)",
server.ts:          [user_id, symbol, lots, finalFillPrice, type, sl || null, tp || null],
server.ts:        );
server.ts:      } catch (error) {
server.ts:        console.error("Failed to insert position", error);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Forward to MT5 Bridge if account is configured for sync
server.ts:    if (user_id && tradingAccountId) {
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const acctRef = dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(user_id).collection('tradingAccounts').doc(tradingAccountId);
server.ts:        const acctSnap = await acctRef.get();
server.ts:        if (acctSnap.exists) {
server.ts:          const acctData = acctSnap.data();
server.ts:          if (acctData?.mt5Sync?.enabled && acctData.mt5Sync.bridgeUrl) {
server.ts:            const { bridgeUrl, token } = acctData.mt5Sync;
server.ts:            console.log(`Forwarding order for account ${tradingAccountId} to MT5 Bridge: ${bridgeUrl}`);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const response = await fetch(`${bridgeUrl}/place_trade`, {
server.ts:              method: 'POST',
server.ts:              headers: { 
server.ts:                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
server.ts:                'Authorization': token ? `Bearer ${token}` : ''
server.ts:              },
server.ts:              body: JSON.stringify({
server.ts:                symbol: symbol.replace("/", ""), 
server.ts:                type: type.toUpperCase(),
server.ts:                volume: lots,
server.ts:                sl: sl || 0,
server.ts:                tp: tp || 0
server.ts:              })
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (!response.ok) {
server.ts:              const errorText = await response.text();
server.ts:              console.warn(`MT5 Bridge responded with error: ${response.status} - ${errorText}`);
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:              const bridgeResult = await response.json();
server.ts:              console.log(`MT5 Bridge execution result:`, bridgeResult);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch (e) {
server.ts:        console.error("Failed to communicate with per-account MT5 Bridge:", e);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    res.json({
server.ts:      status: "filled",
server.ts:      symbol,
server.ts:      type,
server.ts:      lots,
server.ts:      fillPrice: finalFillPrice,
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/equity/:user_id", authenticate, async (req: any, res: any) => {
server.ts:    const { user_id } = req.params;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // Security: Only owner or staff
server.ts:    if (user_id !== req.user.uid) {
server.ts:       let isStaff = false;
server.ts:       const isSuperAdmin = req.user.email === 'websiteanglia@gmail.com' || req.user.email === 'admin@prop.com';
server.ts:       if (isSuperAdmin) {
server.ts:         isStaff = true;
server.ts:       } else {
server.ts:         try {
server.ts:           const userSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:           const role = userSnap.data()?.role;
server.ts:           if (role === 'admin' || role === 'moderator') isStaff = true;
server.ts:           else {
server.ts:             const adminSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('admins').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:             if (adminSnap.exists) isStaff = true;
server.ts:           }
server.ts:         } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:           console.error("Firebase Admin Error:", err);
server.ts:           return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal Server Error' });
server.ts:         }
server.ts:       }
server.ts:       if (!isStaff) {
server.ts:         return res.status(403).json({ error: "Forbidden" });
server.ts:       }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // In a full implementation, this sums user balance + PnL from open positions
server.ts:    // PnL = (current_price - open_price) * lots * multiplier
server.ts:    res.json({ equity: 100000, balance: 100000, active_positions: 0 });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:  app.get("/api/tx-data", authenticate, async (req: any, res: any) => {
server.ts:    const db = getDb();
server.ts:    if (!db) return res.json([]);
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      // Check if user is staff (admin or moderator)
server.ts:      let isStaff = false;
server.ts:      const isSuperAdmin = 
server.ts:        req.user.email === 'websiteanglia@gmail.com' || 
server.ts:        req.user.email === 'admin@prop.com' ||
server.ts:        req.user.email === 'florinelvictorlupascu@gmail.com' ||
server.ts:        req.user.uid === '92Lluf6ztBasw1COuRRXHteVJfr1';
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (isSuperAdmin) {
server.ts:        isStaff = true;
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        const userSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:        const role = userSnap.data()?.role;
server.ts:        if (role === 'admin' || role === 'moderator') {
server.ts:          isStaff = true;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          const adminSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('admins').doc(req.user.uid).get();
server.ts:          if (adminSnap.exists) isStaff = true;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Security: Staff can see all tx, users see only theirs
server.ts:      const result = await db.query(
server.ts:        'SELECT id, user_id as "userId", amount, type, status, date as "createdAt", payment_method as "paymentMethod", description FROM sql_transactions WHERE ($1 = TRUE OR user_id = $2) ORDER BY date DESC',
server.ts:        [isStaff, req.user.uid]
server.ts:      );

server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      console.error(e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "DB Error" });

server.ts:  app.post("/api/tx-data", authenticate, async (req: any, res: any) => {
server.ts:    const db = getDb();
server.ts:    if (!db) return res.json({ id: Date.now() });
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { user_id, amount, type, status, payment_method, description } =
server.ts:        req.body;
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Security: Users can only insert their own transactions
server.ts:      if (user_id !== req.user.uid) {
server.ts:        return res.status(403).json({ error: "Forbidden" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const result = await db.query(
server.ts:        'INSERT INTO sql_transactions (user_id, amount, type, status, payment_method, description) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6) RETURNING id, user_id as "userId", amount, type, status, date as "createdAt", payment_method as "paymentMethod", description',
server.ts:        [user_id, amount, type, status, payment_method, description],
server.ts:      );
server.ts:      res.json(result.rows[0]);
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      console.error(e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "DB Error" });
server.ts:    }

server.ts:        },

server.ts:          countries: ["Russia", "Ukraine", "Belarus", "Kazakhstan"],
server.ts:          firstNames: ["Ivan", "Dmitry", "Sergey", "Nikolay", "Anna", "Maria", "Ekaterina", "Svetlana", "Vladimir", "Mikhail", "Artem", "Sofia"],

server.ts:        }
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:
server.ts:      const created = [];
server.ts:      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
server.ts:        // Pick a random region
server.ts:        const region = regionData[Math.floor(Math.random() * regionData.length)];
server.ts:        const botCountry = region.countries[Math.floor(Math.random() * region.countries.length)];
server.ts:        const firstName = region.firstNames[Math.floor(Math.random() * region.firstNames.length)];
server.ts:        
server.ts:        let lastName = region.lastInitials[Math.floor(Math.random() * region.lastInitials.length)];
server.ts:        // Add random variation to avoid name collision if possible (only 1-3 digits so it looks like a gamer handle or initial)
server.ts:        if (Math.random() > 0.7) {
server.ts:          lastName = lastName.replace('.', '') + ' ' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 99);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const name = `${firstName} ${lastName}`;
server.ts:        const id = `bot-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10)}`;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Use DiceBear avatars with appropriate styles (avataaars, bottts, identicon, lorelei, etc. for variety)
server.ts:        const styles = ['avataaars', 'lorelei', 'notionists', 'adventurer', 'micah'];
server.ts:        const avatarStyle = styles[Math.floor(Math.random() * styles.length)];
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Generate realistic created date between 1 and 180 days ago
server.ts:        const createdAt = Date.now() - (Math.floor(Math.random() * 180) + 1) * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
server.ts:
server.ts:        const botData = {
server.ts:          id,
server.ts:          name,
server.ts:          email: `${id}@bot.fundedgoo.com`,
server.ts:          role: 'trader',
server.ts:          isBot: true,
server.ts:          botProfile: profile, // 'balanced', 'aggressive', 'scalper', etc.
server.ts:          country: botCountry,
server.ts:          avatar: `https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/${avatarStyle}/svg?seed=${id}`,
server.ts:          createdAt,
server.ts:          status: 'verified'
server.ts:        };
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          await dbAdmin.collection('users').doc(id).set(botData);
server.ts:        } catch (dbErr: any) {
server.ts:          console.error("DB Error creating bot:", dbErr);
server.ts:          throw dbErr;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        created.push(botData);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.json({ message: `Successfully generated ${count} bots! You will see them populated below shortly.`, created });
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("General error generating bots:", e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: e.message, stack: e.stack });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  app.post("/api/create-checkout-session", authenticate, async (req: any, res: any) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { packageId, packageName, price, userEmail, platform, discountCode } = req.body;
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Security: Ensure email matches authenticated user
server.ts:      if (userEmail !== req.user.email) {
server.ts:        return res.status(403).json({ error: "Email mismatch" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const stripe = await getStripe();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      let finalPrice = price;
server.ts:      let appliedDiscount = 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (discountCode) {
server.ts:        const promoSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('promotions')
server.ts:          .where('discountCode', '==', discountCode.toUpperCase())
server.ts:          .where('isActive', '==', true)
server.ts:          .get();
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (!promoSnap.empty) {
server.ts:          const promoContent = promoSnap.docs[0];
server.ts:          const promo = promoContent.data();
server.ts:          let isValid = true;
server.ts:          
server.ts:          if (promo.validUntil && new Date(promo.validUntil).getTime() < new Date().getTime()) {
server.ts:            isValid = false;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          if (promo.usageLimit > 0 && (promo.usageCount || 0) >= promo.usageLimit) {
server.ts:            isValid = false;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (isValid) {
server.ts:            // Check if it's for everyone or for this specific user
server.ts:            if (promo.showToAll) {
server.ts:              appliedDiscount = promo.discountRate;
server.ts:            } else if (promo.targetUserIds) {
server.ts:               // We need to resolve the user ID from email first if we want to be strict
server.ts:               const userSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users')
server.ts:                 .where('email', '==', userEmail)
server.ts:                 .get();
server.ts:               if (!userSnap.empty) {
server.ts:                  const userId = userSnap.docs[0].id;
server.ts:                  if (promo.targetUserIds.includes(userId)) {
server.ts:                    appliedDiscount = promo.discountRate;
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:               }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (appliedDiscount > 0) {
server.ts:        finalPrice = price * (1 - appliedDiscount / 100);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log(`Purchase package: ${packageId}, discountCode used: ${discountCode}, discount applied: ${appliedDiscount}%`);
server.ts:
server.ts:      const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
server.ts:        payment_method_types: ["card"],
server.ts:        line_items: [
server.ts:          {
server.ts:            price_data: {
server.ts:              currency: "usd",
server.ts:              product_data: {
server.ts:                name: `${packageName} Challenge`,
server.ts:                description: `Prop firm challenge account: ${packageName}${discountCode ? ` (Discount code: ${discountCode})` : ''}`,
server.ts:              },
server.ts:              unit_amount: Math.round(finalPrice * 100), // Stripe expects cents
server.ts:            },
server.ts:            quantity: 1,
server.ts:          },
server.ts:        ],
server.ts:        mode: "payment",
server.ts:        success_url: `${req.headers.origin}/?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}&status=success`,
server.ts:        cancel_url: `${req.headers.origin}/shop?status=cancel`,
server.ts:        customer_email: userEmail,
server.ts:        metadata: {
server.ts:          packageId,
server.ts:          userEmail,
server.ts:          platform: platform || 'DX',
server.ts:          discountCode: discountCode || '',
server.ts:        },
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ id: session.id, url: session.url });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Stripe Error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/competitions/:id/participants", authenticate, async (req: any, res: any) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const compId = req.params.id;
server.ts:      if (!dbAdmin) {
server.ts:        throw new Error("Firestore Admin not initialized");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const currentProject = firebaseAdminApp.options.projectId || process.env.GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT || 'unknown';
server.ts:      const currentDb = (dbAdmin as any)._databaseId || '(default)';
server.ts:      
server.ts:      console.log(`Fetching participants. Comp: ${compId}, Proj: ${currentProject}, DB: ${currentDb}`);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Fetch all users to map user details
server.ts:      let usersSnap;
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        usersSnap = await dbAdmin.collection('users').get();
server.ts:      } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:        console.error("Firestore ERROR in participants route:", e.message);
server.ts:        if (e.message?.includes("PERMISSION_DENIED")) {
server.ts:          console.error(`PERMISSION_DENIED details: Project: ${currentProject}, DB: ${currentDb}`);
server.ts:          console.error("Check if the database ID matches the one in firebase-applet-config.json and if IAM roles are correct.");
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        throw e;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const userMap = new Map();
server.ts:      usersSnap.forEach((doc: any) => {
server.ts:         const data = doc.data();
server.ts:         userMap.set(doc.id, {
server.ts:            name: data.name || '',
server.ts:            realName: data.realName || '',
server.ts:            lastName: data.lastName || '',
server.ts:            country: data.country || 'Global'
server.ts:         });
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Get all trading accounts using a regular collection group query
server.ts:      // Without index, collectionGroup where() might fail, so we fetch all and filter locally
server.ts:      const accountsSnap = await dbAdmin.collectionGroup('tradingAccounts').get();
server.ts:      const participants: any[] = [];
server.ts:
server.ts:      accountsSnap.forEach((doc: any) => {
server.ts:         const acc = doc.data();
server.ts:         // The parent of tradingAccounts document is the 'tradingAccounts' collection, whose parent is the User document
server.ts:         const userId = acc.userId || doc.ref.parent.parent?.id;
server.ts:         if (acc.type === 'competition' && acc.competitionId === compId && userId) {
server.ts:            console.log("Found participant acc:", acc.competitionId, compId, userId);
server.ts:            const u = userMap.get(userId);
server.ts:            if (u) {
server.ts:               // Generate short name
server.ts:               const shortName = u.name.split(' ')[0] + ' ' + (u.lastName ? u.lastName.charAt(0) + '.' : '');
server.ts:               participants.push({
server.ts:                 id: doc.id,
server.ts:                 userId: userId,
server.ts:                 shortName: shortName.trim(),
server.ts:                 country: u.country,
server.ts:                 balance: acc.balance || 0,
server.ts:                 equity: acc.equity || acc.balance || 0,
server.ts:                 trades: acc.history || []
server.ts:               });
server.ts:            }
server.ts:         }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Sort by balance descending
server.ts:      participants.sort((a, b) => b.balance - a.balance);
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json(participants);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.error('Error fetching participants:', e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: e.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:

server.ts:  // ==========================================
server.ts:  // FEED: MARKET STATUS
server.ts:  // ==========================================
server.ts:  app.get("/api/forex/market-status", (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const d = new Date();
server.ts:    const day = d.getUTCDay(); // 0 = Sun, 5 = Fri, 6 = Sat
server.ts:    const hour = d.getUTCHours();
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let isClosed = false;
server.ts:    // Market closes Friday 21:00 UTC and opens Sunday 21:00 UTC
server.ts:    if (day === 5 && hour >= 21) isClosed = true; 
server.ts:    if (day === 6) isClosed = true; 
server.ts:    if (day === 0 && hour < 21) isClosed = true; 
server.ts:
server.ts:    res.json({ isClosed, serverTime: d.toISOString() });
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  app.get("/api/forex/candles", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { symbol = "EUR/USD", interval = "1Min", count = "300" } = req.query;
server.ts:    const uiTf = String(interval).toUpperCase();
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      if (typeof activeInstruments !== 'undefined') activeInstruments.add(String(symbol)); // Subscribe to live feed
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Map TF to dukascopy-node standard
server.ts:      const mapTimeframe: Record<string, string> = {
server.ts:        'M1': 'm1', '1MIN': 'm1', 'S10': 'm1', 'S30': 'm1',
server.ts:        'M5': 'm5', '5MIN': 'm5',
server.ts:        'M15': 'm15', '15MIN': 'm15',
server.ts:        'M30': 'm30', '30MIN': 'm30',
server.ts:        'H1': 'h1', '1HOUR': 'h1',
server.ts:        'H4': 'h4', '4HOUR': 'h4',
server.ts:        'D1': 'd1', '1DAY': 'd1',
server.ts:        'W1': 'd1', '1WEEK': 'd1'
server.ts:      };
server.ts:      const dInterval = mapTimeframe[uiTf] || 'm1';
server.ts:      const numCount = parseInt(String(count), 10) || 300;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const cacheKey = `${String(symbol)}_${dInterval}_${numCount}`;
server.ts:      const now = Date.now();
server.ts:      const cached = candlesCache.get(cacheKey);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Cache valid for 30 seconds to prevent spamming Dukascopy
server.ts:      if (cached && cached.data && now - cached.timestamp < 30000) {
server.ts:        return res.json(cached.data);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // If already fetching, wait for the existing promise to resolve
server.ts:      if (cached && cached.promise) {
server.ts:        const data = await cached.promise;
server.ts:        return res.json(data);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const dukSym = typeof mapSymbolToDukascopy === 'function' ? mapSymbolToDukascopy(String(symbol)) : String(symbol).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '').toLowerCase();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const intervalMsMap: Record<string, number> = {
server.ts:        'm1': 60000,
server.ts:        'm5': 300000,
server.ts:        'm15': 900000,
server.ts:        'm30': 1800000,
server.ts:        'h1': 3600000,
server.ts:        'h4': 14400000,
server.ts:        'd1': 86400000
server.ts:      };
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const tsEnd = new Date();
server.ts:      // Look back far enough to account for missing data and get required count
server.ts:      const tsStart = new Date(tsEnd.getTime() - ((intervalMsMap[dInterval] || 60000) * numCount * 2.5));
server.ts:
server.ts:      const fetchPromise = (async () => {
server.ts:        const data = await pRetry(async () => {
server.ts:          return await getHistoricalRates({
server.ts:            instrument: dukSym,
server.ts:            timeframe: dInterval as any,
server.ts:            dates: { from: tsStart, to: tsEnd },
server.ts:            format: "json"
server.ts:          });
server.ts:        }, { retries: 2 });
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (!data || data.length === 0) {
server.ts:          throw new Error("No data returned from dukascopy-node for " + symbol);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Map to Lightweight Charts format
server.ts:        let candles = data.map((c: any) => ({
server.ts:          time: Math.floor(c.timestamp / 1000), // Time trebuie să fie in secunde pe platforma noastra (Lightweight charts)
server.ts:          open: c.open,
server.ts:          high: c.high,
server.ts:          low: c.low,
server.ts:          close: c.close,
server.ts:          volume: c.volume || 0
server.ts:        }));
server.ts:
server.ts:        candles.sort((a: any, b: any) => a.time - b.time);
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (candles.length > numCount) {
server.ts:          candles = candles.slice(-numCount);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        return candles;
server.ts:      })();
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Store the promise in the cache to coalesce multiple simultaneous requests
server.ts:      candlesCache.set(cacheKey, { timestamp: now, promise: fetchPromise });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const finalCandles = await fetchPromise;
server.ts:      candlesCache.set(cacheKey, { timestamp: Date.now(), data: finalCandles });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json(finalCandles);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.log(`[Feed/Dukascopy] API Fetch Failed for ${symbol}: ${e.message || e}`);
server.ts:      return res.json([]);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // ==========================================
server.ts:  // DUKASCOPY-NODE: QUOTES (REAL-TIME POLLING FROM BACKGROUND FEED)
server.ts:  // ==========================================
server.ts:  app.get("/api/forex/quotes", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { instruments = "EUR/USD" } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const list = String(instruments || "EUR/USD").split(",");
server.ts:      const result: Record<string, any> = {};
server.ts:      const nowMs = Date.now();
server.ts:
server.ts:      for (const origSym of list) {
server.ts:        const sym = origSym.trim();
server.ts:        if (!sym) continue;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (typeof activeInstruments !== 'undefined') activeInstruments.add(sym); // Keep hot in live feed
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (typeof liveRatesMap !== 'undefined' && liveRatesMap[sym]) {
server.ts:          const payload = liveRatesMap[sym]; // [timestamp, bid, ask]
server.ts:          result[sym] = payload;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          // Provide an immediate cached snapshot fallback until the live feed connects
server.ts:          const ratesData = getRatesFromCache();
server.ts:          const rates = ratesData?.success ? (ratesData?.data?.rates || {}) : {};
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const s = sym.toUpperCase().replace("_", "/");
server.ts:          let basePrice = 1.08520;
server.ts:          if (s.includes("EUR/USD")) basePrice = rates["EUR"] ? (rates["USD"] || 1.0) / rates["EUR"] : 1.08520;
server.ts:          else if (s.includes("GBP/USD")) basePrice = rates["GBP"] ? (rates["USD"] || 1.0) / rates["GBP"] : 1.26850;
server.ts:          else if (s.includes("USD/JPY")) basePrice = rates["USD"] && rates["JPY"] ? rates["JPY"] / rates["USD"] : 155.620;
server.ts:          else if (s.includes("XAU")) basePrice = rates["XAU"] ? (rates["USD"] || 1.0) / rates["XAU"] : 2341.50;
server.ts:          else if (s.includes("BTC")) basePrice = rates["BTC"] ? (rates["USD"] || 1.0) / rates["BTC"] : 68500.00;
server.ts:          else if (s.includes("ETH")) basePrice = rates["ETH"] ? (rates["USD"] || 1.0) / rates["ETH"] : 3750.00;
server.ts:
server.ts:          const spread = s.includes("JPY") ? 0.012 : 0.00015;
server.ts:          result[sym] = [nowMs, basePrice - spread, basePrice];
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.setHeader("X-Chart-Fallback", "false"); 
server.ts:      res.json(result);
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.log(`[Feed] Error retrieving quotes for ${instruments}: ${e.message || e}`);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Feed error" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // ExchangeRate-API Rates Endpoints

GUIDE.md:# Platform Operation Guide & Payout System Documentation
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:## 1. Multi-Account Management
GUIDE.md:The platform supports multiple trading accounts per user. Each account can have different types:
GUIDE.md:- **Evaluation:** Challenge accounts.
GUIDE.md:- **Funded:** Live trading accounts after passing evaluation.
GUIDE.md:- **Competition:** Monthly tournament accounts.
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:### Terminal Switching
GUIDE.md:In the **Trading Terminal (Node Environment)**, you can switch between accounts using the dropdown at the top right. If you have multiple accounts (e.g., a Free Demo and a Competition account), ensure you select the correct one to see your balance and trades.
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:## 2. Competition System
GUIDE.md:- **Registration:** When joining a competition, a new $100k account is automatically provisioned.
GUIDE.md:- **Notifications:** Users receive a real-time notification when their competition account is ready.
GUIDE.md:- **Access:** Competition accounts are visible in the **Terminals Hub** and **My Challenges** views.
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:## 3. Staggered Payout System (14-Day Vesting)
GUIDE.md:To ensure platform stability and professional trade management, we implement a staggered profit unlocking system for **Funded Accounts**.
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:### How it works:
GUIDE.md:1. **Profit Capture:** Every profitable trade closed on a funded account is converted into a "Payout Milestone".
GUIDE.md:2. **Vesting Period:** Profits are locked for 14 calendar days from the moment the trade is closed.
GUIDE.md:3. **Unlock:** After 14 days, the profit becomes "Available" in your Payout Wallet.
GUIDE.md:4. **Calculations:**
GUIDE.md:   - **Total Profit:** All profit earned on the account.
GUIDE.md:   - **Locked Amount:** Profits earned within the last 14 days.
GUIDE.md:   - **Matured Amount (Available):** Profits older than 14 days.
GUIDE.md:5. **Withdrawal:**
GUIDE.md:   - When you request a payout, the system calculates your **80% share** of the **Matured Amount**.
GUIDE.md:   - The withdrawn amount is deducted from your trading account balance and equity.
GUIDE.md:   - The remaining 20% stays in the platform as the house share.
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:## 4. MT5 Sync & Copy-Trading (Admin Only)
GUIDE.md:Administrators can configure individual copy-trading bridges for each user account.
GUIDE.md:- **Selective Copying:** Only accounts with MT5 Sync enabled will transmit trades to the broker destination.
GUIDE.md:- **Unique Destinations:** Each account can have its own `Bridge URL` and `Auth Token`, allowing you to put different users on different MT5 accounts.
GUIDE.md:- **Configuration:** Found in the Admin Panel -> Trader List -> Trader Overview -> MT5 Sync Section.
GUIDE.md:
GUIDE.md:## 5. Troubleshooting
GUIDE.md:- **Balance 0:** If your terminal shows 0 balance, check the Account Dropdown to ensure you aren't on an old evaluation account that has been breached or is empty. Switch to your active Competition or Funded account.
GUIDE.md:- **Notifications:** Ensure you have accepted browser notification permissions and check the notification bell at the top right of the dashboard.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:========================================================================
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:       GHID DE CONFIGURARE: SINCRONIZARE AUTOMATĂ WEB -> MT5 REAL
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:========================================================================
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:Acest sistem permite executarea automată a tranzacțiilor puse pe platforma web
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:direct pe conturi reale de MetaTrader 5 (MT5) prin intermediul unui VPS.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:Sistemul este configurat să permită REPARTIZAREA DIFERITĂ a conturilor:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:- Poti selecta exact care conturi "Funded" să se sincronizeze.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:- Fiecare cont poate avea propriul său VPS sau propria sa instanță de MT5.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:PASUL 1: Pregătirea VPS-ului (Windows)
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:1. Instalează MetaTrader 5 pe VPS-ul tău.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:2. Autentifică-te în terminalul MT5 cu contul real pe care vrei să se pună trade-urile.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:3. IMPORTANT: În MT5, mergi la Tools -> Options -> Expert Advisors și:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   - Bifează "Allow Algo Trading".
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   - Bifează "Allow WebRequest for listed URL" (opțional, dar recomandat).
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:4. Lasă terminalul MT5 DESCHIS în permanență.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:PASUL 2: Instalarea Scriptului Bridge (Python)
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:1. Instalează Python (minim versiunea 3.8) de pe python.org.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:2. Deschide CMD (Terminal) pe VPS și instalează librăriile necesare:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   pip install MetaTrader5 Flask
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:3. Descarcă fișierul `mt5_bridge.py` din panoul de Admin al platformei tale
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   (Tab-ul "MT5 Bridge").
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:4. Rulează scriptul pe VPS:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   python mt5_bridge.py
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:5. Notează IP-ul VPS-ului și Portul (implicit 5000) și TOKEN-ul afișat în terminal.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:PASUL 3: Activarea Sincronizării din Panoul de Admin
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:Acum poți alege ce utilizatori și ce conturi să fie copiate pe MT5:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:1. Intră în Admin Panel -> Tab-ul "Users".
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:2. Caută utilizatorul dorit și apasă pe "View Details" (butonul cu ochi/lupă).
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:3. În fereastra care se deschide, vei vedea lista de conturi (Trading Accounts).
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:4. Fiecare cont are acum o secțiune "MT5 Bridge Copy-Trading":
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   - Bifează comutatorul (Switch-ul) pentru a activa sincronizarea.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   - Introdu Bridge URL: ex. http://IP_VPS_TAU:5000
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   - Introdu Token: Token-ul de securitate setat în script.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:5. De acum, orice tranzacție pusă de acel utilizator pe acel cont specific
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   va fi trimisă instant către VPS-ul tău și executată pe MT5.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:CUM FUNCȚIONEAZĂ (Flux Tehnic)
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:------------------------------------------------------------------------
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:1. Clientul apasă "Buy/Sell" în Web Terminal (pentru un cont Funded activat).
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:2. Serverul primește cererea și verifică în baza de date (Firebase) dacă 
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   acel ID de cont are configurat "mt5Sync: enabled".
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:3. Dacă da, Serverul face o cerere securizată (POST) către URL-ul VPS-ului tău.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:4. Scriptul `mt5_bridge.py` primește comanda, verifică token-ul și folosește
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:   funcția `mt5.order_send()` pentru a pune trade-ul în terminalul deschis.
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:AVANTAJ: Poți pune Userul "A" pe VPS-ul 1 și Userul "B" pe VPS-ul 2, sau
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:îi poți lăsa pe toți pe același VPS (folosind același URL) dacă rulezi o
GHID_SINCRONIZARE_MT5.txt:singură instanță de MT5 care gestionează tot.
firestore.rules:rules_version = '2';
firestore.rules:service cloud.firestore {
firestore.rules:  match /databases/{database}/documents {
firestore.rules:    
firestore.rules:    // --- 1. Helper Functions ---
firestore.rules:    function isSignedIn() {
firestore.rules:      return request.auth != null;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isAdmin() {
firestore.rules:      return isSignedIn() && (
firestore.rules:        request.auth.token.email in ['admin@prop.com', 'websiteanglia@gmail.com', 'florinelvictorlupascu@gmail.com', 'fundedgoo@gmail.com', 'cloudcomun@gmail.com'] ||
firestore.rules:        request.auth.uid in ['zqPmFd1eg0cMfW5eFgofbPrtWru2', 'XyFVhiDlrNVP5WIpaA56mGq5wUI3', '92Lluf6ztBasw1COuRRXHteVJfr1']
firestore.rules:      );
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isOwner(userId) {
firestore.rules:      return isSignedIn() && request.auth.uid == userId;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // --- 2. Collection Rules ---
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Public Collections
firestore.rules:    match /packages/{pkgId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:    match /rules/{ruleId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:    match /botProfiles/{profileId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:    match /bot_positions/{posId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:    match /symbolConfigs/{symbolId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:    match /leaderboard/{entryId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:    match /economicEvents/{eventId} { allow read: if true; }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // User Data
firestore.rules:    match /users/{userId} {
firestore.rules:      allow get: if isSignedIn();
firestore.rules:      allow list: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isSignedIn() && request.auth.uid == userId;
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isAdmin() || (isSignedIn() && request.auth.uid == userId);
firestore.rules:      
firestore.rules:      match /notifications/{notifId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read, write: if isOwner(userId);
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:      match /tradingAccounts/{acctId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isOwner(userId) || isAdmin();
firestore.rules:        allow write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Promotions
firestore.rules:    match /promotions/{promoId} {
firestore.rules:      allow list, get: if isSignedIn();
firestore.rules:      allow write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // System and Config
firestore.rules:    match /apis/{apiId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read, write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:    
firestore.rules:    match /admins/{adminId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isSignedIn();
firestore.rules:      allow write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /system/{docId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isSignedIn();
firestore.rules:      allow write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Transactions and Audits
firestore.rules:    match /transactions/{txId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isSignedIn() && (resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid || isAdmin());
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isSignedIn();
firestore.rules:      allow update, delete: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /auditLogs/{logId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read, write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Default Fallback
firestore.rules:    match /{document=**} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:      allow write: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:  }
